You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.41 (commit: 1281a8b6).

## Issue to Resolve

Improve wording of no connection message
We use the strings "No network available" (title) and "There is no network available" (message) together in several places when we detect there's no network connection. As mentioned [here](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/pull/21275#discussion_r1790413203), this is redundant and unhelpful. We should use better wording, or simply use only the title string and no message.

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Thanks for reporting! 👍 <!-- generated_by_dangermattic -->

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/mediapicker/loader/GifMediaDataSource.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/mediapicker/loader/MediaLibraryDataSource.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/mediapicker/loader/StockMediaDataSource.kt`

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader
  2→
  3→import android.content.Context
  4→import com.tenor.android.core.constant.MediaCollectionFormat
  5→import com.tenor.android.core.model.impl.Result
  6→import org.wordpress.android.R
  7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem.Identifier.GifMediaIdentifier
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType.IMAGE
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Empty
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Failure
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Success
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 16→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 17→import org.wordpress.android.util.UriUtilsWrapper
 18→import javax.inject.Inject
 19→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
 20→import kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine
 21→
 22→class GifMediaDataSource
 23→@Inject constructor(
 24→    private val context: Context,
 25→    private val tenorClient: TenorGifClient,
 26→    private val uriUtilsWrapper: UriUtilsWrapper,
 27→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 28→) : MediaSource {
 29→    private var nextPosition: Int = 0
 30→    private val items = mutableListOf<MediaItem>()
 31→    private var lastFilter: String? = null
 32→
 33→    override suspend fun load(forced: Boolean, loadMore: Boolean, filter: String?): MediaLoadingResult {
 34→        if (!loadMore) {
 35→            lastFilter = filter
 36→            items.clear()
 37→            nextPosition = 0
 38→        }
 39→
 40→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 41→            return Failure(
 42→                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 43→                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 44→                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 45→                data = items
 46→            )
 47→        }
 48→
 49→        return if (!filter.isNullOrBlank()) {
 50→            suspendCoroutine { cont ->
 51→                tenorClient.search(filter,
 52→                    nextPosition,
 53→                    PAGE_SIZE,
 54→                    onSuccess = { response ->
 55→                        val gifList = response.results.map { it.toMediaItem() }
 56→
 57→                        items.addAll(gifList)
 58→                        val newPosition = response.next.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
 59→                        val hasMore = newPosition > nextPosition
 60→                        nextPosition = newPosition
 61→                        val result = if (items.isNotEmpty()) {
 62→                            Success(items.toList(), hasMore)
 63→                        } else {
 64→                            Empty(UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_empty_search_list))
 65→                        }
 66→                        cont.resume(result)
 67→                    },
 68→                    onFailure = {
 69→                        val errorMessage = it?.message
 70→                            ?: context.getString(R.string.gif_list_search_returned_unknown_error)
 71→                        cont.resume(
 72→                            Failure(
 73→                                UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 74→                                htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(errorMessage),
 75→                                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 76→                                data = items
 77→                            )
 78→                        )
 79→                    }
 80→                )
 81→            }
 82→        } else {
 83→            buildDefaultScreen()
 84→        }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun buildDefaultScreen(): MediaLoadingResult {
 88→        val title = UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_initial_empty_text)
 89→        return Empty(
 90→            title,
 91→            null,
 92→            R.drawable.img_illustration_media_105dp,
 93→            R.drawable.img_tenor_100dp,
 94→            UiStringRes(R.string.gif_powered_by_tenor)
 95→        )
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun Result.toMediaItem() = MediaItem(
 99→        identifier = GifMediaIdentifier(
100→            uriUtilsWrapper.parse(urlFromCollectionFormat(MediaCollectionFormat.GIF)),
101→            title
102→        ),
103→        url = uriUtilsWrapper.parse(urlFromCollectionFormat(MediaCollectionFormat.GIF_NANO)).toString(),
104→        type = IMAGE,
105→        dataModified = 0
106→    )
107→
108→    private fun Result.urlFromCollectionFormat(format: String) =
109→        medias.firstOrNull()?.get(format)?.url
110→
111→    companion object {
112→        private const val PAGE_SIZE = 36
113→    }
114→}
115→

 40→class MediaLibraryDataSource(
 41→    private val mediaStore: MediaStore,
 42→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 43→    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 44→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 45→    private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper,
 46→    private val siteModel: SiteModel,
 47→    override val mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>
 48→) : MediaSource, MediaSourceWithTypes {
 49→    init {
 50→        dispatcher.register(this)
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    private var loadContinuations = mutableMapOf<MimeType.Type, Continuation<OnMediaListFetched>>()
 54→
 55→    override suspend fun load(
 56→        forced: Boolean,
 57→        loadMore: Boolean,
 58→        filter: String?
 59→    ): MediaLoadingResult {
 60→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 61→            return Failure(
 62→                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 63→                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 64→                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 65→                data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 66→            )
 67→        }
 68→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 69→            val loadingResults = mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
 70→                async {
 71→                    loadPage(
 72→                        siteModel,
 73→                        loadMore,
 74→                        mediaType.toMimeType()
 75→                    )
 76→                }
 77→            }.awaitAll()
 78→
 79→            var error: String? = null
 80→            var hasMore = false
 81→            for (loadingResult in loadingResults) {
 82→                if (loadingResult.isError) {
 83→                    error = loadingResult.error.message
 84→                    break
 85→                } else {
 86→                    hasMore = hasMore || loadingResult.canLoadMore
 87→                }
 88→            }
 89→            if (error != null) {
 90→                Failure(
 91→                    UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 92→                    htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(error),
 93→                    image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 94→                    data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 95→                )
 96→            } else {
 97→                val data = get(mediaTypes, filter)
 98→                if (filter.isNullOrEmpty() || data.isNotEmpty()) {
 99→                    MediaLoadingResult.Success(data, hasMore)
100→                } else {
101→                    Empty(
102→                        UiStringRes(R.string.media_empty_search_list),
103→                        image = R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
104→                    )
105→                }
106→            }
107→        }
108→    }
109→
110→    private suspend fun get(mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>, filter: String?): List<MediaItem> {
111→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
112→            mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
113→                async {
114→                    if (filter == null) {
115→                        getFromDatabase(mediaType)
116→                    } else {
117→                        searchInDatabase(mediaType, filter)
118→                    }
119→                }
120→            }.fold(mutableListOf<MediaItem>()) { result, databaseItems ->
121→                result.addAll(databaseItems.await())
122→                result
123→            }.sortedByDescending { it.dataModified }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun List<MediaModel>.toMediaItems(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
128→        return this.filter { it.url.isNotBlank() }.map { mediaModel ->
129→            MediaItem(
130→                RemoteId(mediaModel.mediaId),
131→                mediaModel.url,
132→                mediaModel.title,
133→                mediaType,
134→                mediaModel.mimeType,
135→                mediaModel.uploadDate?.let { dateTimeUtilsWrapper.dateFromIso8601(it).time } ?: 0L
136→            )
137→        }
138→    }
139→
140→    private fun getFromDatabase(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
141→        return when (mediaType) {
142→            IMAGE -> mediaStore.getSiteImages(siteModel)
143→            VIDEO -> mediaStore.getSiteVideos(siteModel)
144→            AUDIO -> mediaStore.getSiteAudio(siteModel)
145→            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.getSiteDocuments(siteModel)
146→        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
147→    }
148→
149→    private fun searchInDatabase(mediaType: MediaType, filter: String): List<MediaItem> {
150→        return when (mediaType) {
151→            IMAGE -> mediaStore.searchSiteImages(siteModel, filter)
152→            VIDEO -> mediaStore.searchSiteVideos(siteModel, filter)
153→            AUDIO -> mediaStore.searchSiteAudio(siteModel, filter)
154→            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.searchSiteDocuments(siteModel, filter)
155→        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
156→    }
157→
158→    private suspend fun loadPage(siteModel: SiteModel, loadMore: Boolean, filter: MimeType.Type): OnMediaListFetched =
159→        suspendCoroutine { cont ->
160→            loadContinuations[filter] = cont
161→            val payload = FetchMediaListPayload(
162→                siteModel,
163→                NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH,
164→                loadMore,
165→                filter
166→            )
167→            dispatcher.dispatch(MediaActionBuilder.newFetchMediaListAction(payload))
168→        }
169→
170→    private fun MediaType.toMimeType(): MimeType.Type {
171→        return when (this) {
172→            IMAGE -> MimeType.Type.IMAGE
173→            VIDEO -> MimeType.Type.VIDEO
174→            AUDIO -> MimeType.Type.AUDIO
175→            DOCUMENT -> MimeType.Type.APPLICATION
176→        }
177→    }
178→
179→    @Subscribe(threadMode = MAIN)
180→    fun onMediaListFetched(event: OnMediaListFetched) {
181→        loadContinuations[event.mimeType]?.resume(event)
182→        loadContinuations.remove(event.mimeType)
183→    }
184→
185→    companion object {
186→        const val NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH = 24
187→    }
188→
189→    class MediaLibraryDataSourceFactory
190→    @Inject constructor(
191→        private val mediaStore: MediaStore,
192→        private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
193→        @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
194→        private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
195→        private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper
196→    ) {
197→        fun build(siteModel: SiteModel, mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>) =
198→            MediaLibraryDataSource(
199→                mediaStore,
200→                dispatcher,
201→                bgDispatcher,
202→                networkUtilsWrapper,
203→                dateTimeUtilsWrapper,
204→                siteModel,
205→                mediaTypes
206→            )
207→    }
208→}
209→

  3→import android.content.res.Configuration

  9→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Column
 10→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
 11→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.imePadding
 12→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.padding
 13→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.size
 14→import androidx.compose.foundation.rememberScrollState
 15→import androidx.compose.foundation.shape.CircleShape
 16→import androidx.compose.foundation.verticalScroll
 17→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
 18→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.Close
 19→import androidx.compose.material3.ExperimentalMaterial3Api

 22→import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme

 32→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext

 37→import coil.compose.AsyncImage
 38→import coil.request.ImageRequest
 39→import org.wordpress.android.R
 40→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.theme.M3Theme
 41→
 42→/**
 43→ * These composables were created for the self-hosted users feature but were written to be reusable
 44→ * in other projects.
 45→ */
 46→
 47→/**
 48→ * A composable that displays an avatar image optionally with a click listener. This
 49→ * is suitable for use in a list, such as in the self-hosted user list feature.
 50→ */
 51→@Composable
 52→fun SmallAvatar(
 53→    avatarUrl: String?,
 54→    onAvatarClick: ((String?) -> Unit)? = null,
 55→) {
 56→    val extraModifier = if (onAvatarClick != null) {
 57→        Modifier.clickable {
 58→            onAvatarClick(avatarUrl)
 59→        }
 60→    } else {
 61→        Modifier
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    if (avatarUrl.isNullOrEmpty()) {
 65→        Icon(
 66→            imageVector = ImageVector.vectorResource(id = R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24),
 67→            contentDescription = null,
 68→            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
 69→            modifier = Modifier
 70→                .size(48.dp)
 71→                .then(
 72→                    extraModifier
 73→                )
 74→        )
 75→    } else {
 76→        AsyncImage(
 77→            model = ImageRequest.Builder(LocalContext.current)
 78→                .data(avatarUrl)
 79→                .error(R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24)
 80→                .crossfade(true)
 81→                .build(),
 82→            contentScale = ContentScale.Fit,
 83→            contentDescription = null,
 84→            modifier = Modifier
 85→                .clip(CircleShape)
 86→                .size(48.dp)
 87→                .then(
 88→                    extraModifier
 89→                )
 90→        )
 91→    }
 92→}
 93→
 94→/**
 95→ * A composable that displays an avatar image at the maximum screen size
 96→ */
 97→@Composable
 98→fun LargeAvatar(avatarUrl: String) {
 99→    AsyncImage(
100→        model = ImageRequest.Builder(LocalContext.current)
101→            .data(avatarUrl)
102→            .error(R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24)
103→            .crossfade(true)
104→            .build(),
105→        contentScale = ContentScale.Fit,
106→        contentDescription = null,
107→        modifier = Modifier
108→            .fillMaxSize()
109→            .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background)
110→    )
111→}
112→
113→/**
114→ * A composable that displays a message when there is no network connection
115→ */
116→@Composable
117→fun OfflineView() {
118→    MessageView(
119→        R.drawable.ic_wifi_off_24px,
120→        R.string.no_network_title,
121→        R.string.no_network_message,
122→    )
123→}
124→
125→/**
126→ * A composable that displays a title with an icon above it and an optional subtitle below it
127→ */
128→@Composable
129→fun MessageView(
130→    @DrawableRes iconRes: Int,
131→    @StringRes titleRes: Int,
132→    @StringRes subtitleRes: Int? = null,
133→) {
134→    Column(
135→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
136→        verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center,
137→        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
138→    ) {
139→        Icon(
140→            imageVector = ImageVector.vectorResource(iconRes),
141→            contentDescription = null,
142→            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
143→            modifier = Modifier
144→                .size(85.dp)
145→        )
146→        Text(
147→            text = stringResource(titleRes),
148→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
149→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
150→        )
151→        if (subtitleRes != null) {
152→            Text(
153→                text = stringResource(subtitleRes),
154→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall,
155→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
156→            )
157→        }
158→    }
159→}
160→
161→/**
162→ * A composable that displays a screen with a top bar and a content area
163→ */
164→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
165→@Composable
166→fun ScreenWithTopBar(
167→    title: String,
168→    onCloseClick: () -> Unit,
169→    isScrollable: Boolean,
170→    closeIcon: ImageVector = Icons.Default.Close,
171→    content: @Composable () -> Unit,
172→) {
173→    M3Theme {
174→        Scaffold(
175→            topBar = {
176→                TopAppBar(
177→                    title = { Text(title) },
178→                    navigationIcon = {
179→                        IconButton(onClick = onCloseClick) {
180→                            Icon(closeIcon, stringResource(R.string.back))
181→                        }
182→                    },
183→                )
184→            },
185→        ) { contentPadding ->
186→            val extraModifier = if (isScrollable) {
187→                Modifier
188→                    .padding(contentPadding)
189→                    .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
190→            } else {
191→                Modifier
192→            }
193→            Column(
194→                modifier = Modifier
195→                    .fillMaxSize()
196→                    .imePadding()
197→                    .then(extraModifier)
198→            ) {
199→                content()
200→            }
201→        }
202→    }
203→}
204→
205→@Composable
206→@Preview(
207→    name = "Offline Screen Light Mode",
208→    showBackground = true
209→)
210→@Preview(
211→    name = "Offline Screen Dark Mode",
212→    showBackground = true,
213→    uiMode = Configuration.UI_MODE_NIGHT_YES,
214→)
215→private fun OfflineScreenPreview() {
216→    val content: @Composable () -> Unit = @Composable {
217→        OfflineView()
218→    }
219→    ScreenWithTopBar(
220→        title = "Title",
221→        content = content,
222→        onCloseClick = {},
223→        isScrollable = false
224→    )
225→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.selfhostedusers
 2→
 3→import android.os.Build
 4→import android.os.Bundle
 5→import androidx.activity.viewModels
 6→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.ComposeView
 7→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.ViewCompositionStrategy
 8→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
 9→import org.wordpress.android.R
10→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.LocaleAwareActivity
13→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableCompat
15→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableExtraCompat
16→
17→@AndroidEntryPoint
18→class SelfHostedUsersActivity : LocaleAwareActivity() {
19→    private val viewModel by viewModels<SelfHostedUsersViewModel>()
20→    private var site: SiteModel? = null
21→
22→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
23→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
24→
25→        site = if (savedInstanceState == null) {
26→            intent.getSerializableExtraCompat(WordPress.SITE)
27→        } else {
28→            savedInstanceState.getSerializableCompat(WordPress.SITE)
29→        }
30→        if (site == null) {
31→            ToastUtils.showToast(this, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
32→            finish()
33→            return
34→        }
35→
36→        setContentView(
37→            ComposeView(this).apply {
38→                if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.Q) {
39→                    this.isForceDarkAllowed = false
40→                }
41→                setViewCompositionStrategy(ViewCompositionStrategy.DisposeOnViewTreeLifecycleDestroyed)
42→                setContent {
43→                    SelfHostedUsersScreen(
44→                        uiState = viewModel.uiState,
45→                        onCloseClick = {
46→                            viewModel.onCloseClick(this@SelfHostedUsersActivity)
47→                        },
48→                        onUserClick = { user ->
49→                            viewModel.onUserClick(user)
50→                        },
51→                        onUserAvatarClick = { avatarUrl ->
52→                            viewModel.onUserAvatarClick(avatarUrl)
53→                        }
54→                    )
55→                }
56→            }
57→        )
58→    }
59→
60→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
61→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
62→        outState.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
63→    }
64→}
65→

 30→import org.wordpress.android.R
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.ProgressDialog
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.ProgressDialogState
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.selfhostedusers.SelfHostedUsersViewModel.SelfHostedUserState
 34→import uniffi.wp_api.UserWithEditContext
 35→
 36→@Composable
 37→fun SelfHostedUsersScreen(
 38→    uiState: StateFlow<SelfHostedUserState>,
 39→    onCloseClick: () -> Unit = {},
 40→    onUserClick: (UserWithEditContext) -> Unit = {},
 41→    onUserAvatarClick: (avatarUrl: String?) -> Unit = {},
 42→) {
 43→    val state = uiState.collectAsState().value
 44→
 45→    val title = when (state) {
 46→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserDetail -> state.user.name
 47→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserAvatar -> ""
 48→        else -> stringResource(R.string.users)
 49→    }
 50→
 51→    val closeIcon = when (state) {
 52→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserAvatar -> Icons.Default.Close
 53→        else -> Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack
 54→    }
 55→
 56→    val isScrollable = when (state) {
 57→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserList -> true
 58→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserDetail -> true
 59→        else -> false
 60→    }
 61→
 62→    Crossfade(
 63→        targetState = state,
 64→        animationSpec = tween(
 65→            durationMillis = integerResource(android.R.integer.config_mediumAnimTime)
 66→        ),
 67→        label = "Crossfade"
 68→    ) { targetState ->
 69→        ScreenWithTopBar(
 70→            title = title,
 71→            onCloseClick = { onCloseClick() },
 72→            isScrollable = isScrollable,
 73→            closeIcon = closeIcon,
 74→        ) {
 75→            when (targetState) {
 76→                is SelfHostedUserState.Loading -> {
 77→                    ProgressDialog(
 78→                        ProgressDialogState(
 79→                            message = R.string.loading,
 80→                            showCancel = false,
 81→                            dismissible = false
 82→                        )
 83→                    )
 84→                }
 85→
 86→                is SelfHostedUserState.UserList -> {
 87→                    UserList(targetState.users, onUserClick)
 88→                }
 89→
 90→                is SelfHostedUserState.EmptyUserList -> {
 91→                    MessageView(
 92→                        R.drawable.ic_people_white_24dp,
 93→                        R.string.no_users,
 94→                    )
 95→                }
 96→
 97→                is SelfHostedUserState.UserAvatar -> {
 98→                    LargeAvatar(targetState.avatarUrl)
 99→                }
100→
101→                is SelfHostedUserState.UserDetail -> {
102→                    UserDetail(
103→                        targetState.user,
104→                        onUserAvatarClick
105→                    )
106→                }
107→
108→                is SelfHostedUserState.Offline -> {
109→                    OfflineView()
110→                }
111→            }
112→        }
113→    }
114→}
115→
116→@Composable
117→private fun UserList(
118→    users: List<UserWithEditContext>,
119→    onUserClick: (UserWithEditContext) -> Unit
120→) {
121→    for (user in users) {
122→        UserLazyRow(user, onUserClick)
123→        HorizontalDivider(thickness = 1.dp, modifier = Modifier.padding(start = 80.dp))
124→    }
125→}
126→
127→@Composable
128→private fun UserLazyRow(
129→    user: UserWithEditContext,
130→    onUserClick: (UserWithEditContext) -> Unit
131→) {
132→    LazyRow(
133→        modifier = Modifier
134→            .fillMaxWidth()
135→            .clickable { onUserClick(user) }
136→    ) {
137→        item {
138→            Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(all = userScreenPaddingDp)) {
139→                SmallAvatar(user.avatarUrls?.values?.firstOrNull())
140→            }
141→        }
142→
143→        item {
144→            Column(
145→                modifier = Modifier
146→                    .padding(
147→                        top = userScreenPaddingDp,
148→                        bottom = userScreenPaddingDp,
149→                        end = userScreenPaddingDp
150→                    )
151→            ) {
152→                Text(
153→                    text = user.name,
154→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
155→                )
156→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(2.dp))
157→                Text(
158→                    text = user.username,
159→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
160→                )
161→                if (user.roles.isNotEmpty()) {
162→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(2.dp))
163→                    Text(
164→                        text = user.roles.joinToString(),
165→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
166→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline,
167→                    )
168→                }
169→            }
170→        }
171→    }
172→}
173→
174→@Composable
175→private fun UserDetail(
176→    user: UserWithEditContext,
177→    onAvatarClick: (String?) -> Unit = {},
178→) {
179→    Row(
180→        modifier = Modifier
181→            .padding(all = userScreenPaddingDp)
182→            .fillMaxWidth()
183→    ) {
184→        Column {
185→            val avatarUrl = user.avatarUrls?.values?.firstOrNull()
186→            SmallAvatar(
187→                avatarUrl = avatarUrl,
188→                onAvatarClick = if (avatarUrl.isNullOrEmpty()) {
189→                    null
190→                } else {
191→                    onAvatarClick
192→                }
193→            )
194→        }
195→
196→        Column(
197→            modifier = Modifier
198→                .padding(start = userScreenPaddingDp)
199→        ) {
200→            UserDetailSection(title = stringResource(R.string.name)) {
201→                UserDetailRow(
202→                    label = stringResource(R.string.username),
203→                    text = user.username,
204→                )
205→                UserDetailRow(
206→                    label = stringResource(R.string.role),
207→                    text = user.roles.joinToString(),
208→                )
209→                UserDetailRow(
210→                    label = stringResource(R.string.first_name),
211→                    text = user.firstName,
212→                )
213→                UserDetailRow(
214→                    label = stringResource(R.string.last_name),
215→                    text = user.lastName,
216→                )
217→                UserDetailRow(
218→                    label = stringResource(R.string.nickname),
219→                    text = user.nickname,
220→                )
221→                // TODO display name is missing from the model
222→            }
223→
224→            UserDetailSection(title = stringResource(R.string.contact_info)) {
225→                UserDetailRow(
226→                    label = stringResource(R.string.email),
227→                    text = user.email,
228→                )
229→                UserDetailRow(
230→                    label = stringResource(R.string.website),
231→                    text = user.url,
232→                )
233→            }
234→
235→            UserDetailSection(title = stringResource(R.string.about_the_user)) {
236→                UserDetailRow(
237→                    label = stringResource(R.string.biographical_info),
238→                    text = user.description.ifEmpty {
239→                        stringResource(R.string.biographical_info_empty)
240→                    },
241→                    isMultiline = true
242→                )
243→            }
244→        }
245→    }
246→}
247→
248→@Composable
249→private fun UserDetailSection(
250→    title: String,
251→    content: @Composable () -> Unit,
252→) {
253→    Text(
254→        text = title,
255→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
256→    )
257→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(userScreenPaddingDp))
258→    content()
259→    HorizontalDivider(thickness = 1.dp)
260→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(userScreenPaddingDp))
261→}
262→
263→@Composable
264→private fun UserDetailRow(
265→    label: String,
266→    text: String,
267→    isMultiline: Boolean = false,
268→) {
269→    Text(
270→        text = label,
271→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge,
272→    )
273→    Text(
274→        text = text,
275→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
276→        maxLines = if (isMultiline) 10 else 1,
277→        overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
278→    )
279→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(userScreenPaddingDp))
280→}
281→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.utils
 2→
 3→import android.os.Parcelable
 4→import androidx.annotation.StringRes
 5→import kotlinx.parcelize.Parcelize
 6→
 7→/**
 8→ * [UiString] is a utility sealed class that represents a string to be used in the UI. It allows a string to be
 9→ * represented as both string resource and text.
10→ */
11→sealed class UiString : Parcelable {
12→    @Parcelize
13→    data class UiStringText(val text: CharSequence) : UiString()
14→    @Parcelize
15→    data class UiStringRes(@StringRes val stringRes: Int) : UiString()
16→    @Parcelize
17→    data class UiStringResWithParams(@StringRes val stringRes: Int, val params: List<UiString>) : UiString() {
18→        constructor(@StringRes stringRes: Int, vararg varargParams: UiString) : this(stringRes, varargParams.toList())
19→    }
20→
21→    // Current localization process does not support <plurals> resource strings,
22→    // so we need to use multiple string resources. Switch to @PluralsRes when it is supported by localization process.
23→    @Parcelize
24→    data class UiStringPluralRes(
25→        @StringRes val zeroRes: Int,
26→        @StringRes val oneRes: Int,
27→        @StringRes val otherRes: Int,
28→        val count: Int
29→    ) : UiString()
30→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement
  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.CancellableContinuation
  4→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  5→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.FlowCollector
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flow
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.suspendCancellableCoroutine
  9→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.Subscribe
 10→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.ThreadMode
 11→import org.wordpress.android.R
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.action.CommentAction.FETCHED_COMMENT_LIKES
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.generated.CommentActionBuilder
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.generated.PostActionBuilder
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.CauseOfOnPostChanged.FetchPostLikes
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.LikeModel
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.AccountStore
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentStore
 20→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentStore.FetchCommentLikesPayload
 21→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.CommentStore.OnCommentLikesChanged
 22→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore
 23→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore.FetchPostLikesPayload
 24→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore.OnPostLikesChanged
 25→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.Store.OnChanged
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.FailureType.GENERIC
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.FailureType.NO_NETWORK
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Failure
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Failure.EmptyStateData
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.LikesData
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Loading
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.LikeCategory.COMMENT_LIKE
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.LikeCategory.POST_LIKE
 34→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 35→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 36→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 37→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 38→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 39→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 40→import javax.inject.Inject
 41→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
 42→
 43→// NOTE: Do not remove the commentStore and postStore fields; commentStore seems needed so that the store is registered
 44→// when we dispatch events; postStore added to keep the rational even if not strictly needed as of today.
 45→// Possibly there is a better way, in that case please update here.
 46→class GetLikesUseCase @Inject constructor(
 47→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 48→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 49→    @Suppress("Unused") val commentStore: CommentStore,
 50→    @Suppress("Unused") val postStore: PostStore,
 51→    val accountStore: AccountStore
 52→) {
 53→    private var getLikesContinuations = mutableMapOf<String, CancellableContinuation<OnChanged<*>>>()
 54→
 55→    init {
 56→        dispatcher.register(this)
 57→    }
 58→
 59→    fun clear() {
 60→        dispatcher.unregister(this)
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    suspend fun getLikesForPost(
 64→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
 65→        paginationParams: PaginationParams
 66→    ): Flow<GetLikesState> = flow {
 67→        getLikes(POST_LIKE, this, fingerPrint, paginationParams)
 68→    }
 69→
 70→    suspend fun getLikesForComment(
 71→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
 72→        paginationParams: PaginationParams
 73→    ): Flow<GetLikesState> = flow {
 74→        getLikes(COMMENT_LIKE, this, fingerPrint, paginationParams)
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "NestedBlockDepth", "LoopWithTooManyJumpStatements")
 78→    private suspend fun getLikes(
 79→        category: LikeCategory,
 80→        flow: FlowCollector<GetLikesState>,
 81→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
 82→        paginationParams: PaginationParams
 83→    ) {
 84→        if (!paginationParams.requestNextPage) {
 85→            flow.emit(Loading)
 86→            delay(PROGRESS_DELAY_MS)
 87→        }
 88→
 89→        val noNetworkDetected = !networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()
 90→
 91→        val result = makeRequest(category, fingerPrint, paginationParams)
 92→
 93→        val isPostLikeEvent = category == POST_LIKE && result is OnPostLikesChanged
 94→        val isCommentLikeEvent = category == COMMENT_LIKE && result is OnCommentLikesChanged
 95→
 96→        if (isPostLikeEvent || isCommentLikeEvent) {
 97→            var likes = listOf<LikeModel>()
 98→            var errorMessage: String? = null
 99→            var hasMore = false
100→
101→            if (result is OnPostLikesChanged) {
102→                likes = result.postLikes
103→                if (result.isError) errorMessage = result.error.message
104→                hasMore = result.hasMore
105→            }
106→
107→            if (result is OnCommentLikesChanged) {
108→                likes = result.commentLikes
109→                if (result.isError) errorMessage = result.error.message
110→            }
111→
112→            val pageInfo = PagingInfo(
113→                pageLength = paginationParams.pageLength,
114→                page = if (likes.isNotEmpty()) ((likes.size - 1) / paginationParams.pageLength) + 1 else 1
115→            )
116→            flow.emit(
117→                if (result.isError) {
118→                    getFailureState(noNetworkDetected, likes, errorMessage, fingerPrint.expectedNumLikes, pageInfo)
119→                } else {
120→                    LikesData(likes, fingerPrint.expectedNumLikes, hasMore, pageInfo)
121→                }
122→            )
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    private suspend fun makeRequest(
127→        category: LikeCategory,
128→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
129→        paginationParams: PaginationParams
130→    ): OnChanged<*> {
131→        return suspendCancellableCoroutine {
132→            getLikesContinuations[category.getActionKey(fingerPrint.siteId, fingerPrint.postOrCommentId)] = it
133→            when (category) {
134→                POST_LIKE -> {
135→                    val payload = FetchPostLikesPayload(
136→                        fingerPrint.siteId,
137→                        fingerPrint.postOrCommentId,
138→                        paginationParams.requestNextPage,
139→                        paginationParams.pageLength
140→                    )
141→                    dispatcher.dispatch(PostActionBuilder.newFetchPostLikesAction(payload))
142→                }
143→                COMMENT_LIKE -> {
144→                    val payload = FetchCommentLikesPayload(
145→                        fingerPrint.siteId,
146→                        fingerPrint.postOrCommentId,
147→                        paginationParams.requestNextPage,
148→                        paginationParams.pageLength
149→                    )
150→                    dispatcher.dispatch(CommentActionBuilder.newFetchCommentLikesAction(payload))
151→                }
152→            }
153→        }
154→    }
155→
156→    private fun getFailureState(
157→        noNetworkDetected: Boolean,
158→        orderedLikes: List<LikeModel>,
159→        errorMessage: String?,
160→        expectedNumLikes: Int,
161→        pageInfo: PagingInfo
162→    ): Failure {
163→        return if (noNetworkDetected) {
164→            Failure(
165→                NO_NETWORK,
166→                UiStringRes(R.string.get_likes_no_network_error),
167→                orderedLikes,
168→                EmptyStateData(
169→                    orderedLikes.isEmpty(),
170→                    UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title)
171→                ),
172→                expectedNumLikes,
173→                orderedLikes.isNotEmpty(),
174→                pageInfo
175→            )
176→        } else {
177→            Failure(
178→                GENERIC,
179→                if (errorMessage.isNullOrEmpty()) {
180→                    UiStringRes(R.string.get_likes_unknown_error)
181→                } else {
182→                    UiStringText(errorMessage)
183→                },
184→                orderedLikes,
185→                EmptyStateData(
186→                    orderedLikes.isEmpty(),
187→                    UiStringRes(R.string.get_likes_empty_state_title)
188→                ),
189→                expectedNumLikes,
190→                orderedLikes.isNotEmpty(),
191→                pageInfo
192→            )
193→        }
194→    }
195→
196→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
197→    fun onPostLikesChanged(event: OnPostLikesChanged) {
198→        if (event.causeOfChange !is FetchPostLikes) {
199→            AppLog.d(T.POSTS, "GetLikesUseCase > unexpected event cause received [${event.causeOfChange}]")
200→            return
201→        }
202→
203→        val key = POST_LIKE.getActionKey(event.siteId, event.postId)
204→
205→        getLikesContinuations[key]?.let {
206→            if(it.isActive) {
207→                it.resume(event)
208→            }
209→            getLikesContinuations.remove(key)
210→        }
211→    }
212→
213→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
214→    fun onCommentLikesChanged(event: OnCommentLikesChanged) {
215→        if (event.causeOfChange != FETCHED_COMMENT_LIKES) {
216→            AppLog.d(T.COMMENTS, "GetLikesUseCase > unexpected event cause received [${event.causeOfChange}]")
217→            return
218→        }
219→
220→        val key = COMMENT_LIKE.getActionKey(event.siteId, event.commentId)
221→
222→        getLikesContinuations[key]?.let {
223→            it.resume(event)
224→            getLikesContinuations.remove(key)
225→        }
226→    }
227→
228→    sealed class GetLikesState {
229→        object Loading : GetLikesState()
230→
231→        data class LikesData(
232→            val likes: List<LikeModel>,
233→            val expectedNumLikes: Int,
234→            val hasMore: Boolean = false,
235→            val pageInfo: PagingInfo,
236→            val iLike: Boolean? = null
237→        ) : GetLikesState()
238→
239→        data class Failure(
240→            val failureType: FailureType,
241→            val error: UiString,
242→            val cachedLikes: List<LikeModel>,
243→            val emptyStateData: EmptyStateData,
244→            val expectedNumLikes: Int,
245→            val hasMore: Boolean,
246→            val pageInfo: PagingInfo,
247→            val iLike: Boolean? = null
248→        ) : GetLikesState() {
249→            data class EmptyStateData(
250→                val showEmptyState: Boolean,
251→                val title: UiStringRes? = null
252→            )
253→        }
254→    }
255→
256→    data class PagingInfo(val pageLength: Int, val page: Int)
257→
258→    // Extend error categories if appropriate
259→    enum class FailureType {
260→        NO_NETWORK,
261→        GENERIC
262→    }
263→
264→    enum class LikeCategory {
265→        POST_LIKE,
266→        COMMENT_LIKE;
267→
268→        fun getActionKey(siteId: Long, entityId: Long): String {
269→            return "${this.name}-$siteId-$entityId"
270→        }
271→    }
272→
273→    data class LikeGroupFingerPrint(val siteId: Long, val postOrCommentId: Long, val expectedNumLikes: Int)
274→    data class PaginationParams(val requestNextPage: Boolean, val pageLength: Int)
275→
276→    companion object {
277→        // Pretty arbitrary amount to allow the loading state to appear to the user
278→        private const val PROGRESS_DELAY_MS = 600L
279→    }
280→}
281→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement
  2→
  3→import androidx.annotation.VisibleForTesting
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.MediatorLiveData
  6→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
  9→import org.wordpress.android.R
 10→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 11→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngageItem.LikedItem
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngageItem.NextLikesPageLoader
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagedListNavigationEvent.OpenUserProfileBottomSheet
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagedListNavigationEvent.OpenUserProfileBottomSheet.UserProfile
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagedListNavigationEvent.PreviewCommentInReader
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagedListNavigationEvent.PreviewPostInReader
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagedListNavigationEvent.PreviewSiteById
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagedListNavigationEvent.PreviewSiteByUrl
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagedListServiceRequestEvent.RequestBlogPost
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagedListServiceRequestEvent.RequestComment
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagementNavigationSource.LIKE_NOTIFICATION_LIST
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.EngagementNavigationSource.LIKE_READER_LIST
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Failure
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.LikesData
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Loading
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.LikeGroupFingerPrint
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.PagingInfo
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.ListScenarioType.LOAD_COMMENT_LIKES
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.ListScenarioType.LOAD_POST_LIKES
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.PreviewBlogByUrlSource.LIKED_COMMENT_USER_HEADER
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
 34→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.comments.ThreadedCommentsActionSource.COMMENT_LIKE_NOTIFICATION
 35→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.tracker.ReaderTracker
 36→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils.ReaderUtilsWrapper
 37→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 38→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 39→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsUtilsWrapper
 40→import org.wordpress.android.util.mapSafe
 41→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
 42→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ScopedViewModel
 43→import javax.inject.Inject
 44→import javax.inject.Named
 45→
 46→class EngagedPeopleListViewModel @Inject constructor(
 47→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 48→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 49→    private val getLikesHandler: GetLikesHandler,
 50→    private val readerUtilsWrapper: ReaderUtilsWrapper,
 51→    private val engagementUtils: EngagementUtils,
 52→    private val analyticsUtilsWrapper: AnalyticsUtilsWrapper
 53→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
 54→    private var isStarted = false
 55→    private var getLikesJob: Job? = null
 56→
 57→    private var listScenario: ListScenario? = null
 58→
 59→    private val _onSnackbarMessage = MediatorLiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>>()
 60→    private val _updateLikesState = MediatorLiveData<GetLikesState>()
 61→    private val _onNavigationEvent = MutableLiveData<Event<EngagedListNavigationEvent>>()
 62→    private val _onServiceRequestEvent = MutableLiveData<Event<EngagedListServiceRequestEvent>>()
 63→
 64→    val onSnackbarMessage: LiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>> = _onSnackbarMessage
 65→    val uiState: LiveData<EngagedPeopleListUiState> = _updateLikesState.mapSafe { state ->
 66→        buildUiState(state, listScenario)
 67→    }
 68→    val onNavigationEvent: LiveData<Event<EngagedListNavigationEvent>> = _onNavigationEvent
 69→    val onServiceRequestEvent: LiveData<Event<EngagedListServiceRequestEvent>> = _onServiceRequestEvent
 70→
 71→    data class EngagedPeopleListUiState(
 72→        val numLikes: Int = 0,
 73→        val showLoading: Boolean,
 74→        val engageItemsList: List<EngageItem>,
 75→        val showEmptyState: Boolean,
 76→        val emptyStateTitle: UiString? = null,
 77→        val emptyStateAction: (() -> Unit)? = null,
 78→        val emptyStateButtonText: UiString? = null
 79→    )
 80→
 81→    fun start(listScenario: ListScenario) {
 82→        if (isStarted) return
 83→        isStarted = true
 84→
 85→        this.listScenario = listScenario
 86→
 87→        _onSnackbarMessage.addSource(getLikesHandler.snackbarEvents) { event ->
 88→            _onSnackbarMessage.value = event
 89→        }
 90→
 91→        _updateLikesState.addSource(getLikesHandler.likesStatusUpdate) { state ->
 92→            _updateLikesState.value = state
 93→        }
 94→
 95→        onRefreshData()
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun onRefreshData() {
 99→        loadRequest(listScenario, requestPostOrComment = true, requestNextPage = false)
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun requestPostOrCommentIfNeeded(
103→        listScenarioType: ListScenarioType,
104→        siteId: Long,
105→        postOrCommentId: Long,
106→        commentPostId: Long
107→    ) {
108→        val postId = if (listScenarioType == LOAD_POST_LIKES) postOrCommentId else commentPostId
109→        val commentId = if (listScenarioType == LOAD_COMMENT_LIKES) postOrCommentId else 0L
110→
111→        if (!readerUtilsWrapper.postExists(
112→                siteId,
113→                postId
114→            )
115→        ) {
116→            _onServiceRequestEvent.value = Event(RequestBlogPost(siteId, postId))
117→        }
118→
119→        if (listScenarioType == LOAD_COMMENT_LIKES && !readerUtilsWrapper.commentExists(
120→                siteId,
121→                postId,
122→                commentId
123→            )
124→        ) {
125→            _onServiceRequestEvent.value = Event(RequestComment(siteId, postId, commentId))
126→        }
127→    }
128→
129→    @Suppress("ForbiddenComment")
130→    private fun loadRequest(
131→        listScenario: ListScenario?,
132→        requestPostOrComment: Boolean,
133→        requestNextPage: Boolean
134→    ) {
135→        if (listScenario == null) return
136→
137→        if (requestPostOrComment) {
138→            requestPostOrCommentIfNeeded(
139→                listScenario.type,
140→                listScenario.siteId,
141→                listScenario.postOrCommentId,
142→                listScenario.commentPostId
143→            )
144→        }
145→
146→        getLikesJob?.cancel()
147→        getLikesJob = launch(bgDispatcher) {
148→            // TODO: currently API is not sorting the likes as the list in notifications does,
149→            // use case logic has code to sort based on a list of ids (ideally the available likers ids taken
150→            // from the notification).
151→            // Keeping the logic for now, but remove empty listOf and relevant logic when API will sort likes
152→            when (listScenario.type) {
153→                LOAD_POST_LIKES -> getLikesHandler.handleGetLikesForPost(
154→                    LikeGroupFingerPrint(
155→                        listScenario.siteId,
156→                        listScenario.postOrCommentId,
157→                        listScenario.headerData.numLikes
158→                    ),
159→                    requestNextPage
160→                )
161→                LOAD_COMMENT_LIKES -> getLikesHandler.handleGetLikesForComment(
162→                    LikeGroupFingerPrint(
163→                        listScenario.siteId,
164→                        listScenario.postOrCommentId,
165→                        listScenario.headerData.numLikes
166→                    ),
167→                    requestNextPage
168→                )
169→            }
170→        }
171→    }
172→
173→    private fun buildUiState(updateLikesState: GetLikesState?, listScenario: ListScenario?): EngagedPeopleListUiState {
174→        val likedItem = listScenario?.headerData?.let {
175→            listOf(
176→                LikedItem(
177→                    author = it.authorName,
178→                    postOrCommentText = it.snippetText,
179→                    authorAvatarUrl = it.authorAvatarUrl,
180→                    likedItemId = listScenario.postOrCommentId,
181→                    likedItemSiteId = listScenario.siteId,
182→                    likedItemSiteUrl = listScenario.commentSiteUrl,
183→                    likedItemPostId = listScenario.commentPostId,
184→                    authorUserId = it.authorUserId,
185→                    authorPreferredSiteId = it.authorPreferredSiteId,
186→                    authorPreferredSiteUrl = it.authorPreferredSiteUrl,
187→                    onGravatarClick = ::onSiteLinkHolderClicked,
188→                    blogPreviewSource = when (listScenario.source) {
189→                        LIKE_NOTIFICATION_LIST -> ReaderTracker.SOURCE_NOTIFICATION
190→                        LIKE_READER_LIST -> ReaderTracker.SOURCE_READER_LIKE_LIST
191→                    },
192→                    onHeaderClicked = ::onHeaderClicked
193→                )
194→            )
195→        } ?: listOf()
196→
197→        val likers = when (updateLikesState) {
198→            is LikesData -> {
199→                engagementUtils.likesToEngagedPeople(
200→                    updateLikesState.likes,
201→                    ::onUserProfileHolderClicked,
202→                    listScenario?.source
203→                ) + appendNextPageLoaderIfNeeded(updateLikesState.hasMore, true, updateLikesState.pageInfo)
204→            }
205→            is Failure -> {
206→                engagementUtils.likesToEngagedPeople(
207→                    updateLikesState.cachedLikes,
208→                    ::onUserProfileHolderClicked,
209→                    listScenario?.source
210→                ) + appendNextPageLoaderIfNeeded(updateLikesState.hasMore, false, updateLikesState.pageInfo)
211→            }
212→            Loading, null -> listOf()
213→        }
214→
215→        var showEmptyState = false
216→        var emptyStateTitle: UiString? = null
217→        var emptyStateAction: (() -> Unit)? = null
218→
219→        if (updateLikesState is Failure) {
220→            updateLikesState.emptyStateData.let {
221→                showEmptyState = it.showEmptyState
222→                emptyStateTitle = it.title
223→                emptyStateAction = ::onRefreshData
224→            }
225→        }
226→
227→        return EngagedPeopleListUiState(
228→            showLoading = updateLikesState is Loading,
229→            engageItemsList = likedItem + likers,
230→            showEmptyState = showEmptyState,
231→            emptyStateTitle = emptyStateTitle,
232→            emptyStateAction = emptyStateAction,
233→            emptyStateButtonText = emptyStateAction?.let { UiStringRes(R.string.retry) }
234→        )
235→    }
236→
237→    private fun appendNextPageLoaderIfNeeded(
238→        hasMore: Boolean,
239→        isLoading: Boolean,
240→        pageInfo: PagingInfo
241→    ): List<EngageItem> {
242→        return if (hasMore) {
243→            listOf(NextLikesPageLoader(isLoading) {
244→                loadRequest(listScenario, requestPostOrComment = false, requestNextPage = true)
245→                analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackLikeListFetchedMore(
246→                    EngagementNavigationSource.getSourceDescription(listScenario?.source),
247→                    ListScenarioType.getSourceDescription(listScenario?.type),
248→                    pageInfo.page + 1,
249→                    pageInfo.pageLength
250→                )
251→            })
252→        } else {
253→            listOf()
254→        }
255→    }
256→
257→    private fun onUserProfileHolderClicked(userProfile: UserProfile, source: EngagementNavigationSource?) {
258→        _onNavigationEvent.value = Event(
259→            OpenUserProfileBottomSheet(
260→                userProfile,
261→                ::onSiteLinkHolderClicked,
262→                source
263→            )
264→        )
265→    }
266→
267→    private fun onSiteLinkHolderClicked(siteId: Long, siteUrl: String, source: String) {
268→        if (ReaderTracker.isUserProfileSource(source)) {
269→            analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackUserProfileSiteShown()
270→        }
271→
272→        if (siteId <= 0L && siteUrl.isNotEmpty()) {
273→            _onNavigationEvent.value = Event(PreviewSiteByUrl(siteUrl, source))
274→        } else if (siteId > 0L) {
275→            _onNavigationEvent.value = Event(PreviewSiteById(siteId, source))
276→        }
277→    }
278→
279→    private fun onHeaderClicked(siteId: Long, siteUrl: String, postOrCommentId: Long, commentPostId: Long) {
280→        _onNavigationEvent.value = Event(
281→            if (commentPostId > 0) {
282→                if (readerUtilsWrapper.postAndCommentExists(siteId, commentPostId, postOrCommentId)) {
283→                    PreviewCommentInReader(siteId, commentPostId, postOrCommentId, COMMENT_LIKE_NOTIFICATION)
284→                } else {
285→                    PreviewSiteByUrl(siteUrl, LIKED_COMMENT_USER_HEADER.sourceDescription)
286→                }
287→            } else {
288→                PreviewPostInReader(siteId, postOrCommentId)
289→            }
290→        )
291→    }
292→
293→    @VisibleForTesting(otherwise = VisibleForTesting.NONE)
294→    public override fun onCleared() {
295→        super.onCleared()
296→        getLikesJob?.cancel()
297→        getLikesHandler.clear()
298→    }
299→}
300→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement
 2→
 3→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
 4→import androidx.lifecycle.MediatorLiveData
 5→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
 6→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flowOn
 7→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.FailureType.NO_NETWORK
 9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState
10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Failure
11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.LikesData
12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Loading
13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.LikeGroupFingerPrint
14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.PaginationParams
15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
16→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
17→import javax.inject.Inject
18→import javax.inject.Named
19→
20→class GetLikesHandler @Inject constructor(
21→    private val getLikesUseCase: GetLikesUseCase,
22→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
23→) {
24→    private val _snackbarEvents = MediatorLiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>>()
25→    val snackbarEvents: LiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>> = _snackbarEvents
26→
27→    private val _likesStatusUpdate = MediatorLiveData<GetLikesState>()
28→    val likesStatusUpdate: LiveData<GetLikesState> = _likesStatusUpdate
29→
30→    suspend fun handleGetLikesForPost(
31→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
32→        requestNextPage: Boolean,
33→        pageLength: Int = LIKES_PER_PAGE_DEFAULT
34→    ) {
35→        // Safety net in case page length is computed rather than a constant in the future.
36→        require(pageLength != 0) { "The page length for likes cannot be 0." }
37→        getLikesUseCase.getLikesForPost(
38→            fingerPrint,
39→            PaginationParams(
40→                requestNextPage,
41→                pageLength
42→            )
43→        ).flowOn(bgDispatcher).collect { state ->
44→            manageState(state)
45→        }
46→    }
47→
48→    suspend fun handleGetLikesForComment(
49→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
50→        requestNextPage: Boolean,
51→        pageLength: Int = LIKES_PER_PAGE_DEFAULT
52→    ) {
53→        // Safety net in case page length is computed rather than a constant in the future.
54→        require(pageLength != 0) { "The page length for likes cannot be 0" }
55→        getLikesUseCase.getLikesForComment(
56→            fingerPrint,
57→            PaginationParams(
58→                requestNextPage,
59→                pageLength
60→            )
61→        ).flowOn(bgDispatcher).collect { state ->
62→            manageState(state)
63→        }
64→    }
65→
66→    fun clear() {
67→        getLikesUseCase.clear()
68→    }
69→
70→    private fun manageState(state: GetLikesState) {
71→        when (state) {
72→            Loading,
73→            is LikesData -> {
74→                _likesStatusUpdate.postValue(state)
75→            }
76→            is Failure -> {
77→                _likesStatusUpdate.postValue(state)
78→                if (state.failureType != NO_NETWORK || !state.emptyStateData.showEmptyState) {
79→                    _snackbarEvents.postValue(Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(state.error)))
80→                }
81→            }
82→        }
83→    }
84→
85→    companion object {
86→        private const val LIKES_PER_PAGE_DEFAULT = 20
87→    }
88→}
89→

 297→    private val appBarLayoutOffsetChangedListener =
 298→        AppBarLayout.OnOffsetChangedListener { appBarLayout, verticalOffset ->
 299→            val collapsingToolbarLayout = appBarLayout
 300→                .findViewById<CollapsingToolbarLayout>(R.id.collapsing_toolbar)
 301→            val toolbar = appBarLayout.findViewById<Toolbar>(R.id.toolbar_main)
 302→
 303→            view?.context?.let { context ->
 304→                val menu: Menu = toolbar.menu
 305→
 306→                val collapsingToolbarHeight = collapsingToolbarLayout.height
 307→                val isCollapsed = (collapsingToolbarHeight + verticalOffset) <=
 308→                        collapsingToolbarLayout.scrimVisibleHeightTrigger
 309→
 310→                val color = if (isCollapsed) {
 311→                    context.getColorFromAttribute(MaterialR.attr.colorOnSurface)
 312→                } else {
 313→                    ContextCompat.getColor(context, R.color.white)
 314→                }
 315→                val colorFilter = BlendModeColorFilterCompat
 316→                    .createBlendModeColorFilterCompat(color, BlendModeCompat.SRC_ATOP)
 317→
 318→                toolbar.setTitleTextColor(color)
 319→                toolbar.navigationIcon?.colorFilter = colorFilter
 320→
 321→                for (i in 0 until menu.size()) {
 322→                    val menuItem = menu.getItem(i)
 323→                    menuItem.icon?.colorFilter = colorFilter
 324→                }
 325→            }
 326→        }

 388→    private fun initSwipeRefreshLayout(view: View) {
 389→        val swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById<CustomSwipeRefreshLayout>(R.id.swipe_to_refresh)
 390→
 391→        // this fragment hides/shows toolbar with scrolling, which messes up ptr animation position
 392→        // so we have to set it manually
 393→        val swipeToRefreshOffset = resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.toolbar_content_offset)
 394→        swipeRefreshLayout.setProgressViewOffset(false, 0, swipeToRefreshOffset)
 395→
 396→        swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(swipeRefreshLayout) {
 397→            if (isAdded) {
 398→                if (commentsSnippetFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 399→                    conversationViewModel.onRefresh()
 400→                }
 401→                updatePost()
 402→            }
 403→        }
 404→    }

 406→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
 407→    private fun initAppBar(view: View) {
 408→        appBar = view.findViewById(R.id.appbar_with_collapsing_toolbar_layout)
 409→        toolBar = appBar.findViewById(R.id.toolbar_main)
 410→
 411→        appBar.addOnOffsetChangedListener(appBarLayoutOffsetChangedListener)
 412→
 413→        // Fixes collapsing toolbar layout being obscured by the status bar when drawn behind it
 414→        ViewCompat.setOnApplyWindowInsetsListener(appBar) { _: View, insets: WindowInsetsCompat ->
 415→            val insetTop = insets.systemWindowInsetTop
 416→            if (insetTop > 0) {
 417→                toolBar.setPadding(0, insetTop, 0, 0)
 418→            }
 419→            insets.consumeSystemWindowInsets()
 420→        }
 421→
 422→        // Fixes viewpager not displaying menu items for first fragment
 423→        val activity = activity as? AppCompatActivity
 424→        activity?.supportActionBar?.hide()
 425→        toolBar.inflateMenu(R.menu.reader_detail)
 426→        toolBar.setOnMenuItemClickListener { handleMenuItemSelected(it)}
 427→
 428→        // for related posts, show an X in the toolbar which closes the activity
 429→        if (isRelatedPost) {
 430→            toolBar.setNavigationIcon(R.drawable.ic_cross_white_24dp)
 431→            toolBar.setNavigationOnClickListener { requireActivity().finish() }
 432→            toolBar.setTitle(R.string.reader_title_related_post_detail)
 433→        } else {
 434→            toolBar.setNavigationIcon(R.drawable.ic_arrow_left_white_24dp)
 435→            toolBar.setNavigationOnClickListener { requireActivity().onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressed() }
 436→        }
 437→    }

 555→    private fun initViewModel(binding: ReaderFragmentPostDetailBinding, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 556→        conversationViewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory).get(
 557→            ConversationNotificationsViewModel::class.java
 558→        )
 559→
 560→        initObservers(binding)
 561→
 562→        val bundle = savedInstanceState ?: arguments
 563→        val isFeed = bundle?.getBoolean(ReaderConstants.ARG_IS_FEED) ?: false
 564→        val interceptedUri = bundle?.getString(ReaderConstants.ARG_INTERCEPTED_URI)
 565→
 566→        if (commentsSnippetFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 567→            conversationViewModel.start(blogId, postId, READER_POST_DETAILS_COMMENTS)
 568→        }
 569→        viewModel.start(isRelatedPost = isRelatedPost, isFeed = isFeed, interceptedUri = interceptedUri)
 570→    }
 571→
 572→    @Suppress("LongMethod")
 573→    private fun initObservers(binding: ReaderFragmentPostDetailBinding) {
 574→        viewModel.uiState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
 575→            uiHelpers.updateVisibility(binding.textError, it.errorVisible)
 576→            uiHelpers.updateVisibility(binding.progressLoading, it.loadingVisible)
 577→            when (it) {
 578→                is LoadingUiState -> Unit // Do Nothing
 579→                is ReaderPostDetailsUiState -> renderUiState(it, binding)
 580→                is ErrorUiState -> {
 581→                    uiHelpers.updateVisibility(signInButton, it.signInButtonVisibility)
 582→                    val message = it.message?.let { msg -> uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(requireContext(), msg) }
 583→                    showError(message?.toString())
 584→                }
 585→            }
 586→        }
 587→
 588→        if (likesEnhancementsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 589→            viewModel.likesUiState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { state ->
 590→                manageLikesUiState(state)
 591→            }
 592→        }
 593→
 594→        viewModel.refreshPost.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
 595→            // Do nothing
 596→        }
 597→
 598→        viewModel.snackbarEvents.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { it.showSnackbar(binding) }
 599→
 600→        viewModel.navigationEvents.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { it.handleNavigationEvent() }
 601→
 602→        if (commentsSnippetFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 603→            conversationViewModel.snackbarEvents.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { event ->
 604→                if (!isAdded) return@observe
 605→
 606→                val fm: FragmentManager = childFragmentManager
 607→                val bottomSheet =
 608→                    fm.findFragmentByTag(NOTIFICATIONS_BOTTOM_SHEET_TAG) as? CommentNotificationsBottomSheetFragment
 609→                if (bottomSheet != null) return@observe
 610→                event.applyIfNotHandled {
 611→                    this.showSnackbar(binding)
 612→                }
 613→            }
 614→
 615→            conversationViewModel.showBottomSheetEvent.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { showBottomSheetData ->
 616→                if (!isAdded) return@observeEvent
 617→
 618→                val fm: FragmentManager = childFragmentManager
 619→                var bottomSheet =
 620→                    fm.findFragmentByTag(NOTIFICATIONS_BOTTOM_SHEET_TAG) as? CommentNotificationsBottomSheetFragment
 621→                if (showBottomSheetData.show && bottomSheet == null) {
 622→                    bottomSheet = CommentNotificationsBottomSheetFragment.newInstance(
 623→                        showBottomSheetData.isReceivingNotifications,
 624→                        true
 625→                    )
 626→                    bottomSheet.show(fm, NOTIFICATIONS_BOTTOM_SHEET_TAG)
 627→                } else if (!showBottomSheetData.show && bottomSheet != null) {
 628→                    bottomSheet.dismiss()
 629→                }
 630→            }
 631→
 632→            conversationViewModel.updateFollowUiState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { uiState ->
 633→                manageFollowConversationUiState(uiState, binding)
 634→            }
 635→
 636→            viewModel.commentSnippetState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { state ->
 637→                manageCommentSnippetUiState(state)
 638→            }
 639→        }
 640→
 641→        viewModel.showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
 642→            JetpackPoweredBottomSheetFragment
 643→                .newInstance()
 644→                .show(childFragmentManager, JetpackPoweredBottomSheetFragment.TAG)
 645→        }
 646→
 647→        viewModel.reloadFragment.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
 648→            if (isAdded) {
 649→                //  Based on my research some people did that in a single transaction and it worked in the past,
 650→                //  but I tested on SDK 34 and I had to do it in two transactions for getting it to work properly.
 651→                parentFragmentManager.commit(allowStateLoss = true) {
 652→                    detach(this@ReaderPostDetailFragment)
 653→                }
 654→                parentFragmentManager.commit {
 655→                    attach(this@ReaderPostDetailFragment)
 656→                }
 657→            }
 658→        }
 659→    }
 660→
 661→    private fun manageFollowConversationUiState(
 662→        uiState: FollowConversationUiState,
 663→        binding: ReaderFragmentPostDetailBinding
 664→    ) {
 665→        if (!isAdded) return
 666→
 667→        with(binding) {
 668→            val bellItem = commentsSnippet.bellIcon
 669→            val followContainer = commentsSnippet.followConversationContainer
 670→
 671→            val shimmerView: ShimmerFrameLayout = commentsSnippet.shimmerViewContainer
 672→            val followText = commentsSnippet.followConversation
 673→            followText.setOnClickListener(
 674→                if (uiState.onFollowTapped != null) {
 675→                    View.OnClickListener { uiState.onFollowTapped.invoke() }
 676→                } else {
 677→                    null
 678→                }
 679→            )
 680→            bellItem.setOnClickListener {
 681→                uiState.onManageNotificationsTapped.invoke()
 682→            }
 683→            followContainer.isEnabled = uiState.flags.isMenuEnabled
 684→            followText.isEnabled = uiState.flags.isMenuEnabled
 685→            bellItem.isEnabled = uiState.flags.isMenuEnabled
 686→            if (uiState.flags.showMenuShimmer) {
 687→                if (!shimmerView.isShimmerVisible) {
 688→                    shimmerView.showShimmer(true)
 689→                } else if (!shimmerView.isShimmerStarted) {
 690→                    shimmerView.startShimmer()
 691→                }
 692→            } else {
 693→                shimmerView.hideShimmer()
 694→            }
 695→            shimmerView.visibility = if (uiState.flags.isFollowMenuVisible) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 696→            bellItem.visibility = if (uiState.flags.isBellMenuVisible) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 697→        }
 698→    }
 699→
 700→    private fun manageLikesUiState(state: TrainOfFacesUiState) {
 701→        if (!isAdded) return
 702→
 703→        with(requireActivity()) {
 704→            if (this.isFinishing) return@with
 705→
 706→            val shouldSkipAnimation = likeFacesTrain.visibility == View.GONE && state.goingToShowFaces
 707→
 708→            setupLikeFacesTrain(
 709→                state.engageItemsList,
 710→                state.showLoading,

 840→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongMethod")
 841→    private fun ReaderNavigationEvents.handleNavigationEvent() {
 842→        when (this) {
 843→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowMediaPreview -> MediaPreviewActivity
 844→                .showPreview(requireContext(), site, featuredImage)
 845→
 846→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowPostsByTag -> ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderTagPreview(
 847→                context,
 848→                this.tag,
 849→                ReaderTracker.SOURCE_POST_DETAIL,
 850→                readerTracker
 851→            )
 852→
 853→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowBlogPreview -> ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderBlogOrFeedPreview(
 854→                context,
 855→                this.siteId,
 856→                this.feedId,
 857→                this.isFollowed,
 858→                ReaderTracker.SOURCE_POST_DETAIL,
 859→                readerTracker
 860→            )
 861→
 862→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.SharePost -> ReaderActivityLauncher.sharePost(context, post)
 863→
 864→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.OpenPost -> ReaderActivityLauncher.openPost(context, post)
 865→
 866→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReportPost ->
 867→                ReaderActivityLauncher.openUrl(context, readerUtilsWrapper.getReportPostUrl(url), OpenUrlType.INTERNAL)
 868→
 869→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReportUser -> ReaderActivityLauncher.openUrl(
 870→                context,
 871→                readerUtilsWrapper.getReportUserUrl(url, authorId),
 872→                OpenUrlType.INTERNAL
 873→            )
 874→
 875→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReaderComments -> ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderCommentsForResult(
 876→                this@ReaderPostDetailFragment,
 877→                blogId,
 878→                postId,
 879→                this.source.sourceDescription
 880→            )
 881→
 882→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowNoSitesToReblog -> ReaderActivityLauncher.showNoSiteToReblog(activity)
 883→
 884→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowSitePickerForResult ->
 885→                ActivityLauncher
 886→                    .showSitePickerForResult(this@ReaderPostDetailFragment, this.preselectedSite, this.mode)
 887→
 888→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.OpenEditorForReblog ->
 889→                ActivityLauncher.openEditorForReblog(activity, this.site, this.post, this.source)
 890→
 891→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowBookmarkedTab -> ActivityLauncher.viewSavedPostsListInReader(activity)
 892→
 893→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowBookmarkedSavedOnlyLocallyDialog -> showBookmarkSavedLocallyDialog(this)
 894→
 895→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.OpenUrl -> ReaderActivityLauncher.openUrl(requireContext(), url)
 896→
 897→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowRelatedPostDetails ->
 898→                showRelatedPostDetail(postId = this.postId, blogId = this.blogId)
 899→
 900→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ReplaceRelatedPostDetailsWithHistory ->
 901→                replaceRelatedPostDetailWithHistory(postId = this.postId, blogId = this.blogId)
 902→
 903→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowPostInWebView -> showPostInWebView(post)
 904→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowEngagedPeopleList -> {
 905→                ActivityLauncher.viewPostLikesListActivity(
 906→                    activity,
 907→                    this.siteId,
 908→                    this.postId,
 909→                    this.headerData,
 910→                    EngagementNavigationSource.LIKE_READER_LIST
 911→                )
 912→            }
 913→
 914→            ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReadingPreferences ->
 915→                ReaderReadingPreferencesDialogFragment.show(
 916→                    childFragmentManager,
 917→                    ReaderReadingPreferencesTracker.Source.POST_DETAIL_MORE_MENU,
 918→                )
 919→
 920→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowPostDetail,
 921→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowVideoViewer,
 922→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReaderSubs -> Unit // Do Nothing
 923→        }
 924→    }
