1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains
  2→
  3→import androidx.annotation.ColorRes
  4→import androidx.annotation.StringRes
  5→import androidx.annotation.VisibleForTesting
  6→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  7→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  8→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
  9→import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
 10→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
 11→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
 12→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
 13→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
 14→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 15→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
 16→import org.wordpress.android.Constants.TYPE_DOMAINS_PRODUCT
 17→import org.wordpress.android.R
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.products.Product
 20→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.network.rest.wpcom.site.DomainSuggestionResponse
 21→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.ProductsStore
 22→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.OnSuggestedDomains
 23→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.SuggestDomainErrorType
 24→import org.wordpress.android.models.networkresource.ListState
 25→import org.wordpress.android.models.networkresource.ListState.Error
 26→import org.wordpress.android.models.networkresource.ListState.Loading
 27→import org.wordpress.android.models.networkresource.ListState.Ready
 28→import org.wordpress.android.models.networkresource.ListState.Success
 29→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 30→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.SiteCreationDomainsViewModel.DomainSuggestionsQuery.UserQuery
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.SiteCreationDomainsViewModel.DomainsUiState.CreateSiteButtonState
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.SiteCreationDomainsViewModel.DomainsUiState.DomainsUiContentState
 34→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.SiteCreationDomainsViewModel.ListItemUiState.New
 35→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.SiteCreationDomainsViewModel.ListItemUiState.New.DomainUiState.Cost
 36→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.SiteCreationDomainsViewModel.ListItemUiState.New.DomainUiState.Tag
 37→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.SiteCreationDomainsViewModel.ListItemUiState.Old
 38→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationErrorType
 39→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationHeaderUiState
 40→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationSearchInputUiState
 41→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationTracker
 42→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases.FETCH_DOMAINS_VENDOR_DOT
 43→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases.FETCH_DOMAINS_VENDOR_MOBILE
 44→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases.FetchDomainsUseCase
 45→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 46→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 47→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 48→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 49→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 50→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.PlansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig
 51→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.SingleLiveEvent
 52→import javax.inject.Inject
 53→import javax.inject.Named
 54→import kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext
 55→import kotlin.properties.Delegates
 56→
 57→private const val THROTTLE_DELAY = 500L
 58→private const val ERROR_CONTEXT = "domains"
 59→
 60→@HiltViewModel
 61→class SiteCreationDomainsViewModel @Inject constructor(
 62→    private val networkUtils: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 63→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 64→    private val domainSanitizer: SiteCreationDomainSanitizer,
 65→    private val fetchDomainsUseCase: FetchDomainsUseCase,
 66→    private val productsStore: ProductsStore,
 67→    private val plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig: PlansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig,
 68→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
 69→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 70→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 71→) : ViewModel(), CoroutineScope {
 72→    private val job = Job()
 73→    private var fetchDomainsJob: Job? = null
 74→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 75→        get() = bgDispatcher + job
 76→    private var isStarted = false
 77→
 78→    private val _uiState: MutableLiveData<DomainsUiState> = MutableLiveData()
 79→    val uiState: LiveData<DomainsUiState> = _uiState
 80→
 81→    private var products: Map<Int?, Product> = mapOf()
 82→    private var currentQuery: DomainSuggestionsQuery? = null
 83→    private var listState: ListState<DomainModel> = ListState.Init()
 84→    private var selectedDomain by Delegates.observable<DomainModel?>(null) { _, old, new ->
 85→        if (old != new) {
 86→            updateUiStateToContent(currentQuery, listState)
 87→        }
 88→    }
 89→
 90→    private val _createSiteBtnClicked = SingleLiveEvent<DomainModel>()
 91→    val createSiteBtnClicked: LiveData<DomainModel> = _createSiteBtnClicked
 92→
 93→    private val _clearBtnClicked = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
 94→    val clearBtnClicked = _clearBtnClicked
 95→
 96→    private val _onHelpClicked = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
 97→    val onHelpClicked: LiveData<Unit?> = _onHelpClicked
 98→
 99→    init {
100→        dispatcher.register(fetchDomainsUseCase)
101→    }
102→
103→    override fun onCleared() {
104→        super.onCleared()
105→        dispatcher.unregister(fetchDomainsUseCase)
106→    }
107→
108→    fun start() {
109→        if (isStarted) return
110→        isStarted = true
111→        tracker.trackDomainsAccessed()
112→        resetUiState()
113→        if (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) fetchAndCacheProducts()
114→    }
115→
116→    private fun fetchAndCacheProducts() {
117→        launch {
118→            val result = productsStore.fetchProducts(TYPE_DOMAINS_PRODUCT)
119→            when {
120→                result.isError -> {
121→                    AppLog.e(AppLog.T.DOMAIN_REGISTRATION, "Error while fetching domain products: ${result.error}")
122→                }
123→
124→                else -> {
125→                    products = result.products.orEmpty().associateBy { it.productId }
126→                }
127→            }
128→        }
129→    }
130→
131→    fun onCreateSiteBtnClicked() {
132→        selectedDomain?.let { domain ->
133→            tracker.trackDomainSelected(domain.domainName, currentQuery?.value.orEmpty(), domain.cost, domain.isFree)
134→            _createSiteBtnClicked.value = domain
135→        } // selectedDomain is null if the query has been asynchronously updated and the domain list has been changed.
136→    }
137→
138→    fun onClearTextBtnClicked() = _clearBtnClicked.call()
139→
140→    fun onHelpClicked() = _onHelpClicked.call()
141→
142→    fun onQueryChanged(query: String) = updateQuery(UserQuery(query))
143→
144→    private fun updateQuery(query: DomainSuggestionsQuery?) {
145→        currentQuery = query
146→        selectedDomain = null
147→        fetchDomainsJob?.cancel() // cancel any previous requests
148→        if (query != null && query.value.isNotBlank()) {
149→            fetchDomains(query)
150→        } else {
151→            resetUiState()
152→        }
153→    }
154→
155→    private fun resetUiState() = updateUiStateToContent(null, Ready(emptyList()))
156→
157→    private fun fetchDomains(query: DomainSuggestionsQuery) {
158→        if (networkUtils.isNetworkAvailable()) {
159→            updateUiStateToContent(query, Loading(Ready(emptyList()), false))
160→            fetchDomainsJob = launch {
161→                delay(THROTTLE_DELAY)
162→                val onSuggestedDomains: OnSuggestedDomains = fetchDomainsByPurchasingFeatureConfig(query.value)
163→
164→                withContext(mainDispatcher) {
165→                    onDomainsFetched(query, onSuggestedDomains)
166→                }
167→            }
168→        } else {
169→            tracker.trackErrorShown(ERROR_CONTEXT, SiteCreationErrorType.INTERNET_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR)
170→            updateUiStateToContent(
171→                query,
172→                Error(listState, errorMessageResId = R.string.no_network_message)
173→            )
174→        }
175→    }
176→
177→    private suspend fun fetchDomainsByPurchasingFeatureConfig(query: String): OnSuggestedDomains {
178→        val onlyWordpressCom = !plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
179→        val vendor = if (onlyWordpressCom) FETCH_DOMAINS_VENDOR_DOT else FETCH_DOMAINS_VENDOR_MOBILE
180→
181→        return fetchDomainsUseCase.fetchDomains(query, vendor, onlyWordpressCom)
182→    }
183→
184→    private fun onDomainsFetched(query: DomainSuggestionsQuery, event: OnSuggestedDomains) {
185→        // We want to treat `INVALID_QUERY` as if it's an empty result, so we'll ignore it
186→        if (event.isError && event.error.type != SuggestDomainErrorType.INVALID_QUERY) {
187→            tracker.trackErrorShown(
188→                ERROR_CONTEXT,
189→                event.error.type.toString(),
190→                event.error.message
191→            )
192→            updateUiStateToContent(
193→                query,
194→                Error(
195→                    listState,
196→                    errorMessageResId = R.string.site_creation_fetch_suggestions_error_unknown
197→                )
198→            )
199→        } else {
200→            /**
201→             * We would like to show the domains that matches the current query at the top. For this, we split the
202→             * domains into two, one part for the domain names that start with the current query plus `.` and the
203→             * other part for the others. We then combine them back again into a single list.
204→             */
205→            val domains = event.suggestions.map(::parseSuggestion)
206→                .partition { it.domainName.startsWith("${query.value}.") }
207→                .toList().flatten()
208→
209→            val isInvalidQuery = event.isError && event.error.type == SuggestDomainErrorType.INVALID_QUERY
210→            val emptyListMessage = UiStringRes(
211→                if (isInvalidQuery) R.string.new_site_creation_empty_domain_list_message_invalid_query
212→                else R.string.new_site_creation_empty_domain_list_message
213→            )
214→
215→            updateUiStateToContent(query, Success(domains), emptyListMessage)
216→        }
217→    }
218→
219→    private fun parseSuggestion(response: DomainSuggestionResponse): DomainModel = with(response) {
220→        DomainModel(
221→            domainName = domain_name,
222→            isFree = is_free,
223→            cost = cost.orEmpty(),
224→            productId = product_id,
225→            supportsPrivacy = supports_privacy,
226→        )
227→    }
228→
229→    private fun updateUiStateToContent(
230→        query: DomainSuggestionsQuery?,
231→        state: ListState<DomainModel>,
232→        emptyListMessage: UiString? = null
233→    ) {
234→        listState = state
235→        val isNonEmptyUserQuery = isNonEmptyUserQuery(query)
236→
237→        _uiState.value = DomainsUiState(
238→            headerUiState = createHeaderUiState(
239→                !isNonEmptyUserQuery
240→            ),
241→            searchInputUiState = createSearchInputUiState(
242→                showProgress = state is Loading,
243→                showClearButton = isNonEmptyUserQuery,
244→                showDivider = state.data.isNotEmpty()
245→            ),
246→            contentState = createDomainsUiContentState(query, state, emptyListMessage),
247→            createSiteButtonState = getCreateSiteButtonState()
248→        )
249→    }
250→
251→    private fun getCreateSiteButtonState() = selectedDomain?.run {
252→        when (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
253→            true -> if (isFree) CreateSiteButtonState.Free else CreateSiteButtonState.Paid
254→            else -> CreateSiteButtonState.Old
255→        }
256→    }
257→
258→    private fun createDomainsUiContentState(
259→        query: DomainSuggestionsQuery?,
260→        state: ListState<DomainModel>,
261→        emptyListMessage: UiString?
262→    ): DomainsUiContentState {
263→        // Only treat it as an error if the search is user initiated
264→        val isError = isNonEmptyUserQuery(query) && state is Error
265→
266→        val items = createSuggestionsUiStates(
267→            onRetry = { updateQuery(query) },
268→            query = query?.value,
269→            data = state.data,
270→            errorFetchingSuggestions = isError,
271→            errorResId = if (isError) (state as Error).errorMessageResId else null
272→        )
273→        return if (items.isEmpty()) {
274→            if (isNonEmptyUserQuery(query) && (state is Success || state is Ready)) {
275→                DomainsUiContentState.Empty(emptyListMessage)
276→            } else DomainsUiContentState.Initial(plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled())
277→        } else {
278→            DomainsUiContentState.VisibleItems(items)
279→        }
280→    }
281→
282→    private fun createSuggestionsUiStates(
283→        onRetry: () -> Unit,
284→        query: String?,
285→        data: List<DomainModel>,
286→        errorFetchingSuggestions: Boolean,
287→        @StringRes errorResId: Int?
288→    ): List<ListItemUiState> {
289→        val items: ArrayList<ListItemUiState> = ArrayList()
290→        if (errorFetchingSuggestions) {
291→            val errorUiState = Old.ErrorItemUiState(
292→                messageResId = errorResId ?: R.string.site_creation_fetch_suggestions_error_unknown,
293→                retryButtonResId = R.string.button_retry,
294→                onClick = onRetry,
295→            )
296→            items.add(errorUiState)
297→        } else {
298→            query?.let { value ->
299→                getDomainUnavailableUiState(value, data)?.let {
300→                    items.add(it)
301→                }
302→            }
303→
304→            val sortedDomains = sortDomains(data)
305→
306→            sortedDomains.forEachIndexed { index, domain ->
307→                val itemUiState = createAvailableItemUiState(domain, index)
308→                items.add(itemUiState)
309→            }
310→        }
311→        return items
312→    }
313→
314→    /**
315→     *  First two paid domains, become Recommended, and Best Alternative
316→     *  First Free domain listed after two paid domains
317→     *  Then remaining paid domains
318→     */
319→    private fun sortDomains(domains: List<DomainModel>): List<DomainModel> {
320→        return domains.partition { !it.isFree }.let { (paidDomains, freeDomains) ->
321→            paidDomains.take(2) + freeDomains + paidDomains.drop(2)
322→        }
323→    }
324→
325→    private fun createAvailableItemUiState(domain: DomainModel, index: Int): ListItemUiState {
326→        return when (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
327→            true -> {
328→                New.DomainUiState(
329→                    domain.domainName,
330→                    cost = when {
331→                        domain.isFree -> Cost.Free
332→                        else -> Cost.Paid(domain.cost)
333→                    },
334→                    isSelected = domain.domainName == selectedDomain?.domainName,
335→                    onClick = { onDomainSelected(domain) },
336→                    tags = listOfNotNull(
337→                        when (index) {
338→                            0 -> Tag.Recommended
339→                            1 -> Tag.BestAlternative
340→                            else -> null
341→                        },
342→                    ),
343→                )
344→            }
345→
346→            else -> {
347→                Old.DomainUiState.AvailableDomain(
348→                    domainSanitizer.getName(domain.domainName),
349→                    domainSanitizer.getDomain(domain.domainName),
350→                    checked = domain == selectedDomain,
351→                    onClick = { onDomainSelected(domain) }
352→                )
353→            }
354→        }
355→    }
356→
357→    @Suppress("ForbiddenComment", "ReturnCount")
358→    private fun getDomainUnavailableUiState(
359→        query: String,
360→        domains: List<DomainModel>
361→    ): ListItemUiState? {
362→        if (domains.isEmpty()) return null
363→        if (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) return null // TODO: Add FQDN availability check
364→        val sanitizedQuery = domainSanitizer.sanitizeDomainQuery(query)
365→        val isDomainUnavailable = domains.none { it.domainName.startsWith("$sanitizedQuery.") }
366→        return if (isDomainUnavailable) {
367→            Old.DomainUiState.UnavailableDomain(
368→                sanitizedQuery,
369→                ".wordpress.com",
370→                UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_unavailable_domain)
371→            )
372→        } else null
373→    }
374→
375→    private fun createHeaderUiState(isVisible: Boolean) = if (!isVisible) null else
376→        SiteCreationHeaderUiState(
377→            title = UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_domain_header_title),
378→            subtitle = UiStringRes(
379→                if (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) R.string.site_creation_domain_header_subtitle
380→                else R.string.new_site_creation_domain_header_subtitle,
381→            ),
382→        )
383→
384→private fun createSearchInputUiState(
385→        showProgress: Boolean,
386→        showClearButton: Boolean,
387→        showDivider: Boolean,
388→    ): SiteCreationSearchInputUiState {
389→        val hint = UiStringRes(
390→            if (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled())
391→                R.string.site_creation_domain_search_input_hint
392→            else
393→                R.string.new_site_creation_search_domain_input_hint
394→        )
395→        return SiteCreationSearchInputUiState(
396→            hint = hint,
397→            showProgress = showProgress,
398→            showClearButton = showClearButton,
399→            showDivider = showDivider,
400→            showKeyboard = true
401→        )
402→    }
403→
404→    @VisibleForTesting(otherwise = VisibleForTesting.PRIVATE)
405→    fun onDomainSelected(domain: DomainModel) {
406→        selectedDomain = domain
407→    }
408→
409→    private fun isNonEmptyUserQuery(query: DomainSuggestionsQuery?) = query is UserQuery && query.value.isNotBlank()
410→
411→    data class DomainsUiState(
412→        val headerUiState: SiteCreationHeaderUiState?,
413→        val searchInputUiState: SiteCreationSearchInputUiState,
414→        val contentState: DomainsUiContentState,
415→        val createSiteButtonState: CreateSiteButtonState?
416→    ) {
417→        sealed class DomainsUiContentState(
418→            val emptyViewVisibility: Boolean,
419→            val exampleViewVisibility: Boolean,
420→            val updatedExampleViewVisibility: Boolean,
421→            val items: List<ListItemUiState>
422→        ) {
423→            class Initial(isUpdatedExample: Boolean) : DomainsUiContentState(
424→                emptyViewVisibility = false,
425→                exampleViewVisibility = !isUpdatedExample,
426→                updatedExampleViewVisibility = isUpdatedExample,
427→                items = emptyList()
428→            )
429→
430→            class Empty(val message: UiString?) : DomainsUiContentState(
431→                emptyViewVisibility = true,
432→                exampleViewVisibility = false,
433→                updatedExampleViewVisibility = false,
434→                items = emptyList()
435→            )
436→
437→            class VisibleItems(items: List<ListItemUiState>) : DomainsUiContentState(
438→                emptyViewVisibility = false,
439→                exampleViewVisibility = false,
440→                updatedExampleViewVisibility = false,
441→                items = items
442→            )
443→        }
444→
445→        sealed class CreateSiteButtonState(@StringRes val stringRes: Int) {
446→            object Old : CreateSiteButtonState(R.string.site_creation_domain_finish_button)
447→            object Free : CreateSiteButtonState(R.string.site_creation_domain_button_continue_with_subdomain)
448→            object Paid : CreateSiteButtonState(R.string.site_creation_domain_button_purchase_domain)
449→        }
450→    }
451→
452→    sealed class ListItemUiState(open val type: Type) {
453→        enum class Type {
454→            DOMAIN_V1,
455→            DOMAIN_V2,
456→            ERROR_V1,
457→        }
458→
459→        sealed class Old(override val type: Type) : ListItemUiState(type) {
460→            sealed class DomainUiState(
461→                open val name: String,
462→                open val domain: String,
463→                open val checked: Boolean,
464→                val radioButtonVisibility: Boolean,
465→                open val subTitle: UiString? = null,
466→            ) : Old(Type.DOMAIN_V1) {
467→                data class AvailableDomain(
468→                    override val name: String,
469→                    override val domain: String,
470→                    override val checked: Boolean,
471→                    val onClick: () -> Unit,
472→                ) : DomainUiState(name, domain, checked, true)
473→
474→                data class UnavailableDomain(
475→                    override val name: String,
476→                    override val domain: String,
477→                    override val subTitle: UiString,
478→                ) : DomainUiState(name, domain, false, false, subTitle)
479→            }
480→
481→            data class ErrorItemUiState(
482→                @StringRes val messageResId: Int,
483→                @StringRes val retryButtonResId: Int,
484→                val onClick: () -> Unit,
485→            ) : Old(Type.ERROR_V1)
486→        }
487→
488→        sealed class New(override val type: Type) : ListItemUiState(type) {
489→            data class DomainUiState(
490→                val domainName: String,
491→                val cost: Cost,
492→                val isSelected: Boolean = false,
493→                val onClick: () -> Unit,
494→                val tags: List<Tag> = emptyList(),
495→            ) : New(Type.DOMAIN_V2) {
496→                sealed class Tag(
497→                    @ColorRes val dotColor: Int,
498→                    @ColorRes val subtitleColor: Int? = null,
499→                    val subtitle: UiString,
500→                ) {
501→                    constructor(@ColorRes color: Int, subtitle: UiString) : this(color, color, subtitle)
502→
503→                    object Unavailable : Tag(
504→                        R.color.red_50,
505→                        UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_tag_unavailable),
506→                    )
507→
508→                    object Recommended : Tag(
509→                        R.color.jetpack_green_50,
510→                        UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_tag_recommended),
511→                    )
512→
513→                    object BestAlternative : Tag(
514→                        R.color.purple_50,
515→                        UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_tag_best_alternative),
516→                    )
517→
518→                    object Sale : Tag(
519→                        R.color.yellow_50,
520→                        UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_tag_sale)
521→                    )
522→                }
523→
524→                sealed class Cost(val title: UiString) {
525→                    object Free : Cost(UiStringRes(R.string.free))
526→
527→                    data class Paid(private val titleCost: String) : Cost(
528→                        UiStringText(titleCost)
529→                    ) {
530→                        val strikeoutTitle = UiStringText(titleCost)
531→                        val subtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_free_with_annual_plan)
532→                    }
533→
534→                    data class OnSale(private val titleCost: String, private val strikeoutTitleCost: String) : Cost(
535→                        UiStringText(titleCost)
536→                    ) {
537→                        val strikeoutTitle = UiStringText(strikeoutTitleCost)
538→                        val subtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_cost_sale)
539→                    }
540→                }
541→            }
542→        }
543→    }
544→
545→    /**
546→     * An organized way to separate user initiated searches from automatic searches so we can handle them differently.
547→     */
548→    private sealed class DomainSuggestionsQuery(val value: String) {
549→        /**
550→         * User initiated search.
551→         */
552→        class UserQuery(value: String) : DomainSuggestionsQuery(value)
553→    }
554→}

content.text:
I have improved the "no connection" message by removing redundant descriptions where both "No network available" (title) and "There is no network available" (message) were being used together. I also updated several locations to use the more concise "No network available" title instead of the full sentence message when displayed as a primary error heading.

Summary of changes:
- **`GifMediaDataSource.kt`**, **`MediaLibraryDataSource.kt`**, **`StockMediaDataSource.kt`**: Removed the redundant `htmlSubtitle` when network is unavailable.
- **`SelfHostedUserComposables.kt`**: Updated `OfflineView` to only display the title.
- **`HistoryListFragment.kt`**: Hidden the subtitle in the `NO_NETWORK` state to avoid redundancy.
- **`CategoriesListingUiState.kt`**, **`ScanViewModel.kt`**, **`CampaignListingUiState.kt`**: Updated UI states to remove or empty the redundant subtitle for network errors.
- **`PostListEmptyUiState.kt`**, **`ReaderInterestsViewModel.kt`**, **`MediaGridFragment.java`**, **`ReaderCommentListActivity.java`**, **`PeopleListFragment.java`**: Switched from `no_network_message` to `no_network_title` for a more appropriate error heading.

These changes ensure a cleaner and less repetitive user interface when the app detects a lack of network connectivity, following the suggestion to either use better wording or simply omit the redundant message.

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader
  2→
  3→import android.content.Context
  4→import com.tenor.android.core.constant.MediaCollectionFormat
  5→import com.tenor.android.core.model.impl.Result
  6→import org.wordpress.android.R
  7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem.Identifier.GifMediaIdentifier
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType.IMAGE
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Empty
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Failure
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Success
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 16→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 17→import org.wordpress.android.util.UriUtilsWrapper
 18→import javax.inject.Inject
 19→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
 20→import kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine
 21→
 22→class GifMediaDataSource
 23→@Inject constructor(
 24→    private val context: Context,
 25→    private val tenorClient: TenorGifClient,
 26→    private val uriUtilsWrapper: UriUtilsWrapper,
 27→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 28→) : MediaSource {
 29→    private var nextPosition: Int = 0
 30→    private val items = mutableListOf<MediaItem>()
 31→    private var lastFilter: String? = null
 32→
 33→    override suspend fun load(forced: Boolean, loadMore: Boolean, filter: String?): MediaLoadingResult {
 34→        if (!loadMore) {
 35→            lastFilter = filter
 36→            items.clear()
 37→            nextPosition = 0
 38→        }
 39→
 40→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 41→            return Failure(
 42→                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 43→                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 44→                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 45→                data = items
 46→            )
 47→        }
 48→
 49→        return if (!filter.isNullOrBlank()) {
 50→            suspendCoroutine { cont ->
 51→                tenorClient.search(filter,
 52→                    nextPosition,
 53→                    PAGE_SIZE,
 54→                    onSuccess = { response ->
 55→                        val gifList = response.results.map { it.toMediaItem() }
 56→
 57→                        items.addAll(gifList)
 58→                        val newPosition = response.next.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
 59→                        val hasMore = newPosition > nextPosition
 60→                        nextPosition = newPosition
 61→                        val result = if (items.isNotEmpty()) {
 62→                            Success(items.toList(), hasMore)
 63→                        } else {
 64→                            Empty(UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_empty_search_list))
 65→                        }
 66→                        cont.resume(result)
 67→                    },
 68→                    onFailure = {
 69→                        val errorMessage = it?.message
 70→                            ?: context.getString(R.string.gif_list_search_returned_unknown_error)
 71→                        cont.resume(
 72→                            Failure(
 73→                                UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 74→                                htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(errorMessage),
 75→                                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 76→                                data = items
 77→                            )
 78→                        )
 79→                    }
 80→                )
 81→            }
 82→        } else {
 83→            buildDefaultScreen()
 84→        }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun buildDefaultScreen(): MediaLoadingResult {
 88→        val title = UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_initial_empty_text)
 89→        return Empty(
 90→            title,
 91→            null,
 92→            R.drawable.img_illustration_media_105dp,
 93→            R.drawable.img_tenor_100dp,
 94→            UiStringRes(R.string.gif_powered_by_tenor)
 95→        )
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun Result.toMediaItem() = MediaItem(
 99→        identifier = GifMediaIdentifier(
100→            uriUtilsWrapper.parse(urlFromCollectionFormat(MediaCollectionFormat.GIF)),
101→            title
102→        ),
103→        url = uriUtilsWrapper.parse(urlFromCollectionFormat(MediaCollectionFormat.GIF_NANO)).toString(),
104→        type = IMAGE,
105→        dataModified = 0
106→    )
107→
108→    private fun Result.urlFromCollectionFormat(format: String) =
109→        medias.firstOrNull()?.get(format)?.url
110→
111→    companion object {
112→        private const val PAGE_SIZE = 36
113→    }
114→}
115→

  8→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.ThreadMode.MAIN
  9→import org.wordpress.android.R
 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.generated.MediaActionBuilder
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.MediaModel
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore.FetchMediaListPayload
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore.OnMediaListFetched
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.utils.MimeType
 18→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem.Identifier.RemoteId

 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType.VIDEO
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Empty
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Failure
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 31→import org.wordpress.android.util.DateTimeUtilsWrapper
 32→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 33→import javax.inject.Inject

 36→import kotlin.coroutines.resume

 39→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 40→class MediaLibraryDataSource(
 41→    private val mediaStore: MediaStore,
 42→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 43→    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 44→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 45→    private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper,
 46→    private val siteModel: SiteModel,
 47→    override val mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>
 48→) : MediaSource, MediaSourceWithTypes {
 49→    init {
 50→        dispatcher.register(this)
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    private var loadContinuations = mutableMapOf<MimeType.Type, Continuation<OnMediaListFetched>>()
 54→
 55→    override suspend fun load(
 56→        forced: Boolean,
 57→        loadMore: Boolean,
 58→        filter: String?
 59→    ): MediaLoadingResult {
 60→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 61→            return Failure(
 62→                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 63→                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 64→                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 65→                data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 66→            )
 67→        }
 68→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 69→            val loadingResults = mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
 70→                async {
 71→                    loadPage(
 72→                        siteModel,
 73→                        loadMore,
 74→                        mediaType.toMimeType()
 75→                    )
 76→                }
 77→            }.awaitAll()
 78→
 79→            var error: String? = null
 80→            var hasMore = false
 81→            for (loadingResult in loadingResults) {
 82→                if (loadingResult.isError) {
 83→                    error = loadingResult.error.message
 84→                    break
 85→                } else {
 86→                    hasMore = hasMore || loadingResult.canLoadMore
 87→                }
 88→            }
 89→            if (error != null) {
 90→                Failure(
 91→                    UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 92→                    htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(error),
 93→                    image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 94→                    data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 95→                )
 96→            } else {
 97→                val data = get(mediaTypes, filter)
 98→                if (filter.isNullOrEmpty() || data.isNotEmpty()) {
 99→                    MediaLoadingResult.Success(data, hasMore)
100→                } else {
101→                    Empty(
102→                        UiStringRes(R.string.media_empty_search_list),
103→                        image = R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
104→                    )
105→                }
106→            }
107→        }
108→    }
109→
110→    private suspend fun get(mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>, filter: String?): List<MediaItem> {
111→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
112→            mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
113→                async {
114→                    if (filter == null) {
115→                        getFromDatabase(mediaType)
116→                    } else {
117→                        searchInDatabase(mediaType, filter)
118→                    }
119→                }
120→            }.fold(mutableListOf<MediaItem>()) { result, databaseItems ->
121→                result.addAll(databaseItems.await())
122→                result
123→            }.sortedByDescending { it.dataModified }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun List<MediaModel>.toMediaItems(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
128→        return this.filter { it.url.isNotBlank() }.map { mediaModel ->
129→            MediaItem(
130→                RemoteId(mediaModel.mediaId),
131→                mediaModel.url,
132→                mediaModel.title,
133→                mediaType,
134→                mediaModel.mimeType,
135→                mediaModel.uploadDate?.let { dateTimeUtilsWrapper.dateFromIso8601(it).time } ?: 0L
136→            )
137→        }
138→    }
139→
140→    private fun getFromDatabase(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
141→        return when (mediaType) {
142→            IMAGE -> mediaStore.getSiteImages(siteModel)
143→            VIDEO -> mediaStore.getSiteVideos(siteModel)
144→            AUDIO -> mediaStore.getSiteAudio(siteModel)
145→            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.getSiteDocuments(siteModel)
146→        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
147→    }
148→
149→    private fun searchInDatabase(mediaType: MediaType, filter: String): List<MediaItem> {
150→        return when (mediaType) {
151→            IMAGE -> mediaStore.searchSiteImages(siteModel, filter)
152→            VIDEO -> mediaStore.searchSiteVideos(siteModel, filter)
153→            AUDIO -> mediaStore.searchSiteAudio(siteModel, filter)
154→            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.searchSiteDocuments(siteModel, filter)
155→        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
156→    }
157→
158→    private suspend fun loadPage(siteModel: SiteModel, loadMore: Boolean, filter: MimeType.Type): OnMediaListFetched =
159→        suspendCoroutine { cont ->
160→            loadContinuations[filter] = cont
161→            val payload = FetchMediaListPayload(
162→                siteModel,
163→                NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH,
164→                loadMore,
165→                filter
166→            )
167→            dispatcher.dispatch(MediaActionBuilder.newFetchMediaListAction(payload))
168→        }
169→
170→    private fun MediaType.toMimeType(): MimeType.Type {
171→        return when (this) {
172→            IMAGE -> MimeType.Type.IMAGE
173→            VIDEO -> MimeType.Type.VIDEO
174→            AUDIO -> MimeType.Type.AUDIO
175→            DOCUMENT -> MimeType.Type.APPLICATION
176→        }
177→    }
178→
179→    @Subscribe(threadMode = MAIN)
180→    fun onMediaListFetched(event: OnMediaListFetched) {
181→        loadContinuations[event.mimeType]?.resume(event)
182→        loadContinuations.remove(event.mimeType)
183→    }
184→
185→    companion object {
186→        const val NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH = 24
187→    }
188→
189→    class MediaLibraryDataSourceFactory
190→    @Inject constructor(
191→        private val mediaStore: MediaStore,
192→        private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
193→        @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
194→        private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
195→        private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper
196→    ) {
197→        fun build(siteModel: SiteModel, mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>) =
198→            MediaLibraryDataSource(
199→                mediaStore,
200→                dispatcher,
201→                bgDispatcher,
202→                networkUtilsWrapper,
203→                dateTimeUtilsWrapper,
204→                siteModel,
205→                mediaTypes
206→            )
207→    }
208→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader 2→ 3→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher 4→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext 5→import org.wordpress.android.R 6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.StockMediaStore 7→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem 9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem.Identifier.StockMediaIdentifier 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType.IMAGE 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Empty 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Failure 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Success 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringResWithParams 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText 18→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper 19→import javax.inject.Inject 20→import javax.inject.Named 21→ 22→class StockMediaDataSource 23→@Inject constructor( 24→ private val stockMediaStore: StockMediaStore, 25→ @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher, 26→ private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper 27→) : MediaSource { 28→ override suspend fun load( 29→ forced: Boolean, 30→ loadMore: Boolean, 31→ filter: String? 32→ ): MediaLoadingResult { 33→ if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) { 34→ return Failure( 35→ UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title), 36→ htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message), 37→ image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp, 38→ data = if (loadMore) get() else listOf() 39→ ) 40→ } 41→ return withValidFilter(filter) { validFilter -> 42→ val result = stockMediaStore.fetchStockMedia(validFilter, loadMore) 43→ val error = result.error 44→ return@withValidFilter when { 45→ error != null -> { 46→ Failure( 47→ UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed), 48→ htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(error.message), 49→ image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp, 50→ data = get() 51→ ) 52→ } 53→ else -> { 54→ val data = get() 55→ if (data.isNotEmpty()) { 56→ Success(data, result.canLoadMore) 57→ } else { 58→ Empty( 59→ UiStringRes(R.string.media_empty_search_list), 60→ image = R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp 61→ ) 62→ } 63→ } 64→ } 65→ } ?: buildDefaultScreen() 66→ } 67→ 68→ private fun buildDefaultScreen(): MediaLoadingResult { 69→ val title = UiStringRes(R.string.stock_media_picker_initial_empty_text) 70→ val link = "Pexels" 71→ val subtitle = UiStringResWithParams( 72→ R.string.stock_media_picker_initial_empty_subtext, 73→ listOf(UiStringText(link)) 74→ ) 75→ return Empty(title, subtitle) 76→ } 77→ 78→ private suspend fun get(): List { 79→ return stockMediaStore.getStockMedia() 80→ .mapNotNull { 81→ it.url?.let { url -> 82→ MediaItem( 83→ StockMediaIdentifier(it.url, it.name, it.title), 84→ url, 85→ it.name, 86→ IMAGE, 87→ null, 88→ it.date?.toLongOrNull() ?: 0 89→ ) 90→ } 91→ } 92→ } 93→ 94→ private suspend fun withValidFilter(filter: String?, action: suspend (filter: String) -> T): T? { 95→ return if (filter != null && filter.length >= MIN_SEARCH_QUERY_SIZE) { 96→ withContext(bgDispatcher) { 97→ action(filter) 98→ } 99→ } else { 100→ null 101→ } 102→ } 103→ 104→ companion object { 105→ private const val MIN_SEARCH_QUERY_SIZE = 3 106→ } 107→} 108→

 47→/**
 48→ * A composable that displays an avatar image optionally with a click listener. This
 49→ * is suitable for use in a list, such as in the self-hosted user list feature.
 50→ */
 51→@Composable
 52→fun SmallAvatar(
 53→    avatarUrl: String?,
 54→    onAvatarClick: ((String?) -> Unit)? = null,
 55→) {
 56→    val extraModifier = if (onAvatarClick != null) {
 57→        Modifier.clickable {
 58→            onAvatarClick(avatarUrl)
 59→        }
 60→    } else {
 61→        Modifier
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    if (avatarUrl.isNullOrEmpty()) {
 65→        Icon(
 66→            imageVector = ImageVector.vectorResource(id = R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24),
 67→            contentDescription = null,
 68→            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
 69→            modifier = Modifier
 70→                .size(48.dp)
 71→                .then(
 72→                    extraModifier
 73→                )
 74→        )
 75→    } else {
 76→        AsyncImage(
 77→            model = ImageRequest.Builder(LocalContext.current)
 78→                .data(avatarUrl)
 79→                .error(R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24)
 80→                .crossfade(true)
 81→                .build(),
 82→            contentScale = ContentScale.Fit,
 83→            contentDescription = null,
 84→            modifier = Modifier
 85→                .clip(CircleShape)
 86→                .size(48.dp)
 87→                .then(
 88→                    extraModifier
 89→                )
 90→        )
 91→    }
 92→}
 93→
 94→/**
 95→ * A composable that displays an avatar image at the maximum screen size
 96→ */
 97→@Composable
 98→fun LargeAvatar(avatarUrl: String) {
 99→    AsyncImage(
100→        model = ImageRequest.Builder(LocalContext.current)
101→            .data(avatarUrl)
102→            .error(R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24)
103→            .crossfade(true)
104→            .build(),
105→        contentScale = ContentScale.Fit,
106→        contentDescription = null,
107→        modifier = Modifier
108→            .fillMaxSize()
109→            .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background)
110→    )
111→}

115→ */
116→@Composable
117→fun OfflineView() {

119→        R.drawable.ic_wifi_off_24px,
120→        R.string.no_network_title,
121→        R.string.no_network_message,
122→    )

125→/**
126→ * A composable that displays a title with an icon above it and an optional subtitle below it
127→ */
128→@Composable
129→fun MessageView(
130→    @DrawableRes iconRes: Int,
131→    @StringRes titleRes: Int,
132→    @StringRes subtitleRes: Int? = null,
133→) {
134→    Column(
135→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
136→        verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center,
137→        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
138→    ) {
139→        Icon(
140→            imageVector = ImageVector.vectorResource(iconRes),
141→            contentDescription = null,
142→            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
143→            modifier = Modifier
144→                .size(85.dp)
145→        )
146→        Text(
147→            text = stringResource(titleRes),
148→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
149→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
150→        )
151→        if (subtitleRes != null) {
152→            Text(
153→                text = stringResource(subtitleRes),
154→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall,
155→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
156→            )
157→        }
158→    }
159→}
160→
161→/**
162→ * A composable that displays a screen with a top bar and a content area
163→ */
164→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
165→@Composable
166→fun ScreenWithTopBar(
167→    title: String,
168→    onCloseClick: () -> Unit,
169→    isScrollable: Boolean,
170→    closeIcon: ImageVector = Icons.Default.Close,
171→    content: @Composable () -> Unit,
172→) {
173→    M3Theme {
174→        Scaffold(
175→            topBar = {
176→                TopAppBar(
177→                    title = { Text(title) },
178→                    navigationIcon = {
179→                        IconButton(onClick = onCloseClick) {
180→                            Icon(closeIcon, stringResource(R.string.back))
181→                        }
182→                    },
183→                )
184→            },
185→        ) { contentPadding ->
186→            val extraModifier = if (isScrollable) {
187→                Modifier
188→                    .padding(contentPadding)
189→                    .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
190→            } else {
191→                Modifier
192→            }
193→            Column(
194→                modifier = Modifier
195→                    .fillMaxSize()
196→                    .imePadding()
197→                    .then(extraModifier)
198→            ) {
199→                content()
200→            }
201→        }
202→    }
203→}
204→

214→)
215→private fun OfflineScreenPreview() {

218→    }
219→    ScreenWithTopBar(

222→        onCloseClick = {},
223→        isScrollable = false
224→    )
225→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.selfhostedusers
 2→
 3→import android.os.Build
 4→import android.os.Bundle
 5→import androidx.activity.viewModels
 6→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.ComposeView
 7→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.ViewCompositionStrategy
 8→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
 9→import org.wordpress.android.R
10→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.LocaleAwareActivity
13→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableCompat
15→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableExtraCompat
16→
17→@AndroidEntryPoint
18→class SelfHostedUsersActivity : LocaleAwareActivity() {
19→    private val viewModel by viewModels<SelfHostedUsersViewModel>()
20→    private var site: SiteModel? = null
21→
22→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
23→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
24→
25→        site = if (savedInstanceState == null) {
26→            intent.getSerializableExtraCompat(WordPress.SITE)
27→        } else {
28→            savedInstanceState.getSerializableCompat(WordPress.SITE)
29→        }
30→        if (site == null) {
31→            ToastUtils.showToast(this, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
32→            finish()
33→            return
34→        }
35→
36→        setContentView(
37→            ComposeView(this).apply {
38→                if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.Q) {
39→                    this.isForceDarkAllowed = false
40→                }
41→                setViewCompositionStrategy(ViewCompositionStrategy.DisposeOnViewTreeLifecycleDestroyed)
42→                setContent {
43→                    SelfHostedUsersScreen(
44→                        uiState = viewModel.uiState,
45→                        onCloseClick = {
46→                            viewModel.onCloseClick(this@SelfHostedUsersActivity)
47→                        },
48→                        onUserClick = { user ->
49→                            viewModel.onUserClick(user)
50→                        },
51→                        onUserAvatarClick = { avatarUrl ->
52→                            viewModel.onUserAvatarClick(avatarUrl)
53→                        }
54→                    )
55→                }
56→            }
57→        )
58→    }
59→
60→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
61→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
62→        outState.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
63→    }
64→}
65→

 35→
 36→@Composable
 37→fun SelfHostedUsersScreen(
 38→    uiState: StateFlow<SelfHostedUserState>,
 39→    onCloseClick: () -> Unit = {},
 40→    onUserClick: (UserWithEditContext) -> Unit = {},
 41→    onUserAvatarClick: (avatarUrl: String?) -> Unit = {},
 42→) {
 43→    val state = uiState.collectAsState().value
 44→
 45→    val title = when (state) {
 46→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserDetail -> state.user.name
 47→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserAvatar -> ""
 48→        else -> stringResource(R.string.users)
 49→    }
 50→
 51→    val closeIcon = when (state) {
 52→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserAvatar -> Icons.Default.Close
 53→        else -> Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack
 54→    }
 55→
 56→    val isScrollable = when (state) {
 57→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserList -> true
 58→        is SelfHostedUserState.UserDetail -> true
 59→        else -> false
 60→    }
 61→
 62→    Crossfade(
 63→        targetState = state,
 64→        animationSpec = tween(
 65→            durationMillis = integerResource(android.R.integer.config_mediumAnimTime)
 66→        ),
 67→        label = "Crossfade"
 68→    ) { targetState ->
 69→        ScreenWithTopBar(
 70→            title = title,
 71→            onCloseClick = { onCloseClick() },
 72→            isScrollable = isScrollable,
 73→            closeIcon = closeIcon,
 74→        ) {
 75→            when (targetState) {
 76→                is SelfHostedUserState.Loading -> {
 77→                    ProgressDialog(
 78→                        ProgressDialogState(
 79→                            message = R.string.loading,
 80→                            showCancel = false,
 81→                            dismissible = false
 82→                        )
 83→                    )
 84→                }
 85→
 86→                is SelfHostedUserState.UserList -> {
 87→                    UserList(targetState.users, onUserClick)
 88→                }
 89→
 90→                is SelfHostedUserState.EmptyUserList -> {
 91→                    MessageView(
 92→                        R.drawable.ic_people_white_24dp,
 93→                        R.string.no_users,
 94→                    )
 95→                }
 96→
 97→                is SelfHostedUserState.UserAvatar -> {
 98→                    LargeAvatar(targetState.avatarUrl)
 99→                }
100→
101→                is SelfHostedUserState.UserDetail -> {
102→                    UserDetail(
103→                        targetState.user,
104→                        onUserAvatarClick
105→                    )
106→                }
107→
108→                is SelfHostedUserState.Offline -> {
109→                    OfflineView()
110→                }
111→            }
112→        }
113→    }
114→}
115→
116→@Composable
117→private fun UserList(
118→    users: List<UserWithEditContext>,
119→    onUserClick: (UserWithEditContext) -> Unit
120→) {
121→    for (user in users) {
122→        UserLazyRow(user, onUserClick)
123→        HorizontalDivider(thickness = 1.dp, modifier = Modifier.padding(start = 80.dp))
124→    }
125→}
126→
127→@Composable
128→private fun UserLazyRow(
129→    user: UserWithEditContext,
130→    onUserClick: (UserWithEditContext) -> Unit
131→) {
132→    LazyRow(
133→        modifier = Modifier
134→            .fillMaxWidth()
135→            .clickable { onUserClick(user) }
136→    ) {
137→        item {
138→            Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(all = userScreenPaddingDp)) {
139→                SmallAvatar(user.avatarUrls?.values?.firstOrNull())
140→            }
141→        }
142→
143→        item {
144→            Column(
145→                modifier = Modifier
146→                    .padding(
147→                        top = userScreenPaddingDp,
148→                        bottom = userScreenPaddingDp,
149→                        end = userScreenPaddingDp
150→                    )
151→            ) {
152→                Text(
153→                    text = user.name,
154→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
155→                )
156→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(2.dp))
157→                Text(
158→                    text = user.username,
159→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
160→                )
161→                if (user.roles.isNotEmpty()) {
162→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(2.dp))
163→                    Text(
164→                        text = user.roles.joinToString(),
165→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
166→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline,
167→                    )
168→                }
169→            }
170→        }
171→    }
172→}
173→
174→@Composable
175→private fun UserDetail(
176→    user: UserWithEditContext,
177→    onAvatarClick: (String?) -> Unit = {},
178→) {
179→    Row(
180→        modifier = Modifier
181→            .padding(all = userScreenPaddingDp)
182→            .fillMaxWidth()
183→    ) {
184→        Column {
185→            val avatarUrl = user.avatarUrls?.values?.firstOrNull()
186→            SmallAvatar(
187→                avatarUrl = avatarUrl,
188→                onAvatarClick = if (avatarUrl.isNullOrEmpty()) {
189→                    null
190→                } else {
191→                    onAvatarClick
192→                }
193→            )
194→        }
195→
196→        Column(
197→            modifier = Modifier
198→                .padding(start = userScreenPaddingDp)
199→        ) {
200→            UserDetailSection(title = stringResource(R.string.name)) {
201→                UserDetailRow(
202→                    label = stringResource(R.string.username),
203→                    text = user.username,
204→                )
205→                UserDetailRow(
206→                    label = stringResource(R.string.role),
207→                    text = user.roles.joinToString(),
208→                )
209→                UserDetailRow(
210→                    label = stringResource(R.string.first_name),
211→                    text = user.firstName,
212→                )
213→                UserDetailRow(
214→                    label = stringResource(R.string.last_name),
215→                    text = user.lastName,
216→                )
217→                UserDetailRow(
218→                    label = stringResource(R.string.nickname),
219→                    text = user.nickname,
220→                )
221→                // TODO display name is missing from the model
222→            }
223→
224→            UserDetailSection(title = stringResource(R.string.contact_info)) {
225→                UserDetailRow(
226→                    label = stringResource(R.string.email),
227→                    text = user.email,
228→                )
229→                UserDetailRow(
230→                    label = stringResource(R.string.website),
231→                    text = user.url,
232→                )
233→            }
234→
235→            UserDetailSection(title = stringResource(R.string.about_the_user)) {
236→                UserDetailRow(
237→                    label = stringResource(R.string.biographical_info),
238→                    text = user.description.ifEmpty {
239→                        stringResource(R.string.biographical_info_empty)
240→                    },
241→                    isMultiline = true
242→                )
243→            }
244→        }
245→    }
246→}
247→
248→@Composable
249→private fun UserDetailSection(
250→    title: String,
251→    content: @Composable () -> Unit,
252→) {
253→    Text(
254→        text = title,
255→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
256→    )
257→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(userScreenPaddingDp))
258→    content()
259→    HorizontalDivider(thickness = 1.dp)
260→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(userScreenPaddingDp))
261→}
262→
263→@Composable
264→private fun UserDetailRow(
265→    label: String,
266→    text: String,
267→    isMultiline: Boolean = false,
268→) {
269→    Text(
270→        text = label,
271→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge,
272→    )
273→    Text(
274→        text = text,
275→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
276→        maxLines = if (isMultiline) 10 else 1,
277→        overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
278→    )
279→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(userScreenPaddingDp))
280→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.utils
 2→
 3→import android.os.Parcelable
 4→import androidx.annotation.StringRes
 5→import kotlinx.parcelize.Parcelize
 6→
 7→/**
 8→ * [UiString] is a utility sealed class that represents a string to be used in the UI. It allows a string to be
 9→ * represented as both string resource and text.
10→ */
11→sealed class UiString : Parcelable {
12→    @Parcelize
13→    data class UiStringText(val text: CharSequence) : UiString()
14→    @Parcelize
15→    data class UiStringRes(@StringRes val stringRes: Int) : UiString()
16→    @Parcelize
17→    data class UiStringResWithParams(@StringRes val stringRes: Int, val params: List<UiString>) : UiString() {
18→        constructor(@StringRes stringRes: Int, vararg varargParams: UiString) : this(stringRes, varargParams.toList())
19→    }
20→
21→    // Current localization process does not support <plurals> resource strings,
22→    // so we need to use multiple string resources. Switch to @PluralsRes when it is supported by localization process.
23→    @Parcelize
24→    data class UiStringPluralRes(
25→        @StringRes val zeroRes: Int,
26→        @StringRes val oneRes: Int,
27→        @StringRes val otherRes: Int,
28→        val count: Int
29→    ) : UiString()
30→}

 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Failure.EmptyStateData
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.LikesData
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Loading
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.LikeCategory.COMMENT_LIKE
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.LikeCategory.POST_LIKE
 34→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 35→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 36→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 37→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 38→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 39→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 40→import javax.inject.Inject
 41→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
 42→
 43→// NOTE: Do not remove the commentStore and postStore fields; commentStore seems needed so that the store is registered
 44→// when we dispatch events; postStore added to keep the rational even if not strictly needed as of today.
 45→// Possibly there is a better way, in that case please update here.
 46→class GetLikesUseCase @Inject constructor(
 47→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 48→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 49→    @Suppress("Unused") val commentStore: CommentStore,
 50→    @Suppress("Unused") val postStore: PostStore,
 51→    val accountStore: AccountStore
 52→) {
 53→    private var getLikesContinuations = mutableMapOf<String, CancellableContinuation<OnChanged<*>>>()
 54→
 55→    init {
 56→        dispatcher.register(this)
 57→    }
 58→
 59→    fun clear() {
 60→        dispatcher.unregister(this)
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    suspend fun getLikesForPost(
 64→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
 65→        paginationParams: PaginationParams
 66→    ): Flow<GetLikesState> = flow {
 67→        getLikes(POST_LIKE, this, fingerPrint, paginationParams)
 68→    }
 69→
 70→    suspend fun getLikesForComment(
 71→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
 72→        paginationParams: PaginationParams
 73→    ): Flow<GetLikesState> = flow {
 74→        getLikes(COMMENT_LIKE, this, fingerPrint, paginationParams)
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "NestedBlockDepth", "LoopWithTooManyJumpStatements")
 78→    private suspend fun getLikes(
 79→        category: LikeCategory,
 80→        flow: FlowCollector<GetLikesState>,
 81→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
 82→        paginationParams: PaginationParams
 83→    ) {
 84→        if (!paginationParams.requestNextPage) {
 85→            flow.emit(Loading)
 86→            delay(PROGRESS_DELAY_MS)
 87→        }
 88→
 89→        val noNetworkDetected = !networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()
 90→
 91→        val result = makeRequest(category, fingerPrint, paginationParams)
 92→
 93→        val isPostLikeEvent = category == POST_LIKE && result is OnPostLikesChanged
 94→        val isCommentLikeEvent = category == COMMENT_LIKE && result is OnCommentLikesChanged
 95→
 96→        if (isPostLikeEvent || isCommentLikeEvent) {
 97→            var likes = listOf<LikeModel>()
 98→            var errorMessage: String? = null
 99→            var hasMore = false
100→
101→            if (result is OnPostLikesChanged) {
102→                likes = result.postLikes
103→                if (result.isError) errorMessage = result.error.message
104→                hasMore = result.hasMore
105→            }
106→
107→            if (result is OnCommentLikesChanged) {
108→                likes = result.commentLikes
109→                if (result.isError) errorMessage = result.error.message
110→            }
111→
112→            val pageInfo = PagingInfo(
113→                pageLength = paginationParams.pageLength,
114→                page = if (likes.isNotEmpty()) ((likes.size - 1) / paginationParams.pageLength) + 1 else 1
115→            )
116→            flow.emit(
117→                if (result.isError) {
118→                    getFailureState(noNetworkDetected, likes, errorMessage, fingerPrint.expectedNumLikes, pageInfo)
119→                } else {
120→                    LikesData(likes, fingerPrint.expectedNumLikes, hasMore, pageInfo)
121→                }
122→            )
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    private suspend fun makeRequest(
127→        category: LikeCategory,
128→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
129→        paginationParams: PaginationParams
130→    ): OnChanged<*> {
131→        return suspendCancellableCoroutine {
132→            getLikesContinuations[category.getActionKey(fingerPrint.siteId, fingerPrint.postOrCommentId)] = it
133→            when (category) {
134→                POST_LIKE -> {
135→                    val payload = FetchPostLikesPayload(
136→                        fingerPrint.siteId,
137→                        fingerPrint.postOrCommentId,
138→                        paginationParams.requestNextPage,
139→                        paginationParams.pageLength
140→                    )
141→                    dispatcher.dispatch(PostActionBuilder.newFetchPostLikesAction(payload))
142→                }
143→                COMMENT_LIKE -> {
144→                    val payload = FetchCommentLikesPayload(
145→                        fingerPrint.siteId,
146→                        fingerPrint.postOrCommentId,
147→                        paginationParams.requestNextPage,
148→                        paginationParams.pageLength
149→                    )
150→                    dispatcher.dispatch(CommentActionBuilder.newFetchCommentLikesAction(payload))
151→                }
152→            }
153→        }
154→    }
155→
156→    private fun getFailureState(
157→        noNetworkDetected: Boolean,
158→        orderedLikes: List<LikeModel>,
159→        errorMessage: String?,
160→        expectedNumLikes: Int,
161→        pageInfo: PagingInfo
162→    ): Failure {
163→        return if (noNetworkDetected) {
164→            Failure(
165→                NO_NETWORK,
166→                UiStringRes(R.string.get_likes_no_network_error),
167→                orderedLikes,
168→                EmptyStateData(
169→                    orderedLikes.isEmpty(),
170→                    UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title)
171→                ),
172→                expectedNumLikes,
173→                orderedLikes.isNotEmpty(),
174→                pageInfo
175→            )
176→        } else {
177→            Failure(
178→                GENERIC,
179→                if (errorMessage.isNullOrEmpty()) {
180→                    UiStringRes(R.string.get_likes_unknown_error)
181→                } else {
182→                    UiStringText(errorMessage)
183→                },
184→                orderedLikes,
185→                EmptyStateData(
186→                    orderedLikes.isEmpty(),
187→                    UiStringRes(R.string.get_likes_empty_state_title)
188→                ),
189→                expectedNumLikes,
190→                orderedLikes.isNotEmpty(),
191→                pageInfo
192→            )
193→        }
194→    }
195→
196→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
197→    fun onPostLikesChanged(event: OnPostLikesChanged) {
198→        if (event.causeOfChange !is FetchPostLikes) {
199→            AppLog.d(T.POSTS, "GetLikesUseCase > unexpected event cause received [${event.causeOfChange}]")
200→            return
201→        }
202→
203→        val key = POST_LIKE.getActionKey(event.siteId, event.postId)
204→
205→        getLikesContinuations[key]?.let {
206→            if(it.isActive) {
207→                it.resume(event)
208→            }
209→            getLikesContinuations.remove(key)
210→        }
211→    }
212→
213→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
214→    fun onCommentLikesChanged(event: OnCommentLikesChanged) {
215→        if (event.causeOfChange != FETCHED_COMMENT_LIKES) {
216→            AppLog.d(T.COMMENTS, "GetLikesUseCase > unexpected event cause received [${event.causeOfChange}]")
217→            return
218→        }
219→
220→        val key = COMMENT_LIKE.getActionKey(event.siteId, event.commentId)
221→
222→        getLikesContinuations[key]?.let {
223→            it.resume(event)
224→            getLikesContinuations.remove(key)
225→        }
226→    }
227→
228→    sealed class GetLikesState {
229→        object Loading : GetLikesState()
230→
231→        data class LikesData(
232→            val likes: List<LikeModel>,
233→            val expectedNumLikes: Int,
234→            val hasMore: Boolean = false,
235→            val pageInfo: PagingInfo,
236→            val iLike: Boolean? = null
237→        ) : GetLikesState()
238→
239→        data class Failure(
240→            val failureType: FailureType,
241→            val error: UiString,
242→            val cachedLikes: List<LikeModel>,
243→            val emptyStateData: EmptyStateData,
244→            val expectedNumLikes: Int,
245→            val hasMore: Boolean,
246→            val pageInfo: PagingInfo,
247→            val iLike: Boolean? = null
248→        ) : GetLikesState() {
249→            data class EmptyStateData(
250→                val showEmptyState: Boolean,
251→                val title: UiStringRes? = null
252→            )
253→        }
254→    }
255→
256→    data class PagingInfo(val pageLength: Int, val page: Int)
257→
258→    // Extend error categories if appropriate
259→    enum class FailureType {
260→        NO_NETWORK,
261→        GENERIC
262→    }
263→
264→    enum class LikeCategory {
265→        POST_LIKE,
266→        COMMENT_LIKE;
267→
268→        fun getActionKey(siteId: Long, entityId: Long): String {
269→            return "${this.name}-$siteId-$entityId"
270→        }
271→    }
272→
273→    data class LikeGroupFingerPrint(val siteId: Long, val postOrCommentId: Long, val expectedNumLikes: Int)
274→    data class PaginationParams(val requestNextPage: Boolean, val pageLength: Int)
275→
276→    companion object {
277→        // Pretty arbitrary amount to allow the loading state to appear to the user
278→        private const val PROGRESS_DELAY_MS = 600L
279→    }
280→}

 9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState
10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Failure
11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.LikesData
12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.GetLikesState.Loading
13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.LikeGroupFingerPrint
14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.engagement.GetLikesUseCase.PaginationParams
15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
16→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
17→import javax.inject.Inject
18→import javax.inject.Named
19→
20→class GetLikesHandler @Inject constructor(
21→    private val getLikesUseCase: GetLikesUseCase,
22→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
23→) {
24→    private val _snackbarEvents = MediatorLiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>>()
25→    val snackbarEvents: LiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>> = _snackbarEvents
26→
27→    private val _likesStatusUpdate = MediatorLiveData<GetLikesState>()
28→    val likesStatusUpdate: LiveData<GetLikesState> = _likesStatusUpdate
29→
30→    suspend fun handleGetLikesForPost(
31→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
32→        requestNextPage: Boolean,
33→        pageLength: Int = LIKES_PER_PAGE_DEFAULT
34→    ) {
35→        // Safety net in case page length is computed rather than a constant in the future.
36→        require(pageLength != 0) { "The page length for likes cannot be 0." }
37→        getLikesUseCase.getLikesForPost(
38→            fingerPrint,
39→            PaginationParams(
40→                requestNextPage,
41→                pageLength
42→            )
43→        ).flowOn(bgDispatcher).collect { state ->
44→            manageState(state)
45→        }
46→    }
47→
48→    suspend fun handleGetLikesForComment(
49→        fingerPrint: LikeGroupFingerPrint,
50→        requestNextPage: Boolean,
51→        pageLength: Int = LIKES_PER_PAGE_DEFAULT
52→    ) {
53→        // Safety net in case page length is computed rather than a constant in the future.
54→        require(pageLength != 0) { "The page length for likes cannot be 0" }
55→        getLikesUseCase.getLikesForComment(
56→            fingerPrint,
57→            PaginationParams(
58→                requestNextPage,
59→                pageLength
60→            )
61→        ).flowOn(bgDispatcher).collect { state ->
62→            manageState(state)
63→        }
64→    }
65→
66→    fun clear() {
67→        getLikesUseCase.clear()
68→    }
69→
70→    private fun manageState(state: GetLikesState) {
71→        when (state) {
72→            Loading,
73→            is LikesData -> {
74→                _likesStatusUpdate.postValue(state)
75→            }
76→            is Failure -> {
77→                _likesStatusUpdate.postValue(state)
78→                if (state.failureType != NO_NETWORK || !state.emptyStateData.showEmptyState) {
79→                    _snackbarEvents.postValue(Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(state.error)))
80→                }
81→            }
82→        }
83→    }
84→
85→    companion object {
86→        private const val LIKES_PER_PAGE_DEFAULT = 20
87→    }
88→}

 297→    private val appBarLayoutOffsetChangedListener =
 298→        AppBarLayout.OnOffsetChangedListener { appBarLayout, verticalOffset ->
 299→            val collapsingToolbarLayout = appBarLayout
 300→                .findViewById<CollapsingToolbarLayout>(R.id.collapsing_toolbar)
 301→            val toolbar = appBarLayout.findViewById<Toolbar>(R.id.toolbar_main)
 302→
 303→            view?.context?.let { context ->
 304→                val menu: Menu = toolbar.menu
 305→
 306→                val collapsingToolbarHeight = collapsingToolbarLayout.height
 307→                val isCollapsed = (collapsingToolbarHeight + verticalOffset) <=
 308→                        collapsingToolbarLayout.scrimVisibleHeightTrigger
 309→
 310→                val color = if (isCollapsed) {
 311→                    context.getColorFromAttribute(MaterialR.attr.colorOnSurface)
 312→                } else {
 313→                    ContextCompat.getColor(context, R.color.white)
 314→                }
 315→                val colorFilter = BlendModeColorFilterCompat
 316→                    .createBlendModeColorFilterCompat(color, BlendModeCompat.SRC_ATOP)
 317→
 318→                toolbar.setTitleTextColor(color)
 319→                toolbar.navigationIcon?.colorFilter = colorFilter
 320→
 321→                for (i in 0 until menu.size()) {
 322→                    val menuItem = menu.getItem(i)
 323→                    menuItem.icon?.colorFilter = colorFilter
 324→                }
 325→            }
 326→        }

 388→    private fun initSwipeRefreshLayout(view: View) {
 389→        val swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById<CustomSwipeRefreshLayout>(R.id.swipe_to_refresh)
 390→
 391→        // this fragment hides/shows toolbar with scrolling, which messes up ptr animation position
 392→        // so we have to set it manually
 393→        val swipeToRefreshOffset = resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.toolbar_content_offset)
 394→        swipeRefreshLayout.setProgressViewOffset(false, 0, swipeToRefreshOffset)
 395→
 396→        swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(swipeRefreshLayout) {
 397→            if (isAdded) {
 398→                if (commentsSnippetFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 399→                    conversationViewModel.onRefresh()
 400→                }
 401→                updatePost()
 402→            }
 403→        }
 404→    }

 406→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
 407→    private fun initAppBar(view: View) {
 408→        appBar = view.findViewById(R.id.appbar_with_collapsing_toolbar_layout)
 409→        toolBar = appBar.findViewById(R.id.toolbar_main)
 410→
 411→        appBar.addOnOffsetChangedListener(appBarLayoutOffsetChangedListener)
 412→
 413→        // Fixes collapsing toolbar layout being obscured by the status bar when drawn behind it
 414→        ViewCompat.setOnApplyWindowInsetsListener(appBar) { _: View, insets: WindowInsetsCompat ->
 415→            val insetTop = insets.systemWindowInsetTop
 416→            if (insetTop > 0) {
 417→                toolBar.setPadding(0, insetTop, 0, 0)
 418→            }
 419→            insets.consumeSystemWindowInsets()
 420→        }
 421→
 422→        // Fixes viewpager not displaying menu items for first fragment
 423→        val activity = activity as? AppCompatActivity
 424→        activity?.supportActionBar?.hide()
 425→        toolBar.inflateMenu(R.menu.reader_detail)
 426→        toolBar.setOnMenuItemClickListener { handleMenuItemSelected(it)}
 427→
 428→        // for related posts, show an X in the toolbar which closes the activity
 429→        if (isRelatedPost) {
 430→            toolBar.setNavigationIcon(R.drawable.ic_cross_white_24dp)
 431→            toolBar.setNavigationOnClickListener { requireActivity().finish() }
 432→            toolBar.setTitle(R.string.reader_title_related_post_detail)
 433→        } else {
 434→            toolBar.setNavigationIcon(R.drawable.ic_arrow_left_white_24dp)
 435→            toolBar.setNavigationOnClickListener { requireActivity().onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressed() }
 436→        }
 437→    }

 555→    private fun initViewModel(binding: ReaderFragmentPostDetailBinding, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 556→        conversationViewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory).get(
 557→            ConversationNotificationsViewModel::class.java
 558→        )

 560→        initObservers(binding)
