 572→    @Suppress("LongMethod")
 573→    private fun initObservers(binding: ReaderFragmentPostDetailBinding) {
 574→        viewModel.uiState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
 575→            uiHelpers.updateVisibility(binding.textError, it.errorVisible)
 576→            uiHelpers.updateVisibility(binding.progressLoading, it.loadingVisible)
 577→            when (it) {
 578→                is LoadingUiState -> Unit // Do Nothing
 579→                is ReaderPostDetailsUiState -> renderUiState(it, binding)
 580→                is ErrorUiState -> {
 581→                    uiHelpers.updateVisibility(signInButton, it.signInButtonVisibility)
 582→                    val message = it.message?.let { msg -> uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(requireContext(), msg) }
 583→                    showError(message?.toString())
 584→                }
 585→            }
 586→        }
 587→
 588→        if (likesEnhancementsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 589→            viewModel.likesUiState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { state ->
 590→                manageLikesUiState(state)
 591→            }
 592→        }
 593→
 594→        viewModel.refreshPost.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
 595→            // Do nothing
 596→        }
 597→
 598→        viewModel.snackbarEvents.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { it.showSnackbar(binding) }
 599→
 600→        viewModel.navigationEvents.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { it.handleNavigationEvent() }
 601→
 602→        if (commentsSnippetFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 603→            conversationViewModel.snackbarEvents.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { event ->
 604→                if (!isAdded) return@observe
 605→
 606→                val fm: FragmentManager = childFragmentManager
 607→                val bottomSheet =
 608→                    fm.findFragmentByTag(NOTIFICATIONS_BOTTOM_SHEET_TAG) as? CommentNotificationsBottomSheetFragment
 609→                if (bottomSheet != null) return@observe
 610→                event.applyIfNotHandled {
 611→                    this.showSnackbar(binding)
 612→                }
 613→            }
 614→
 615→            conversationViewModel.showBottomSheetEvent.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { showBottomSheetData ->
 616→                if (!isAdded) return@observeEvent
 617→
 618→                val fm: FragmentManager = childFragmentManager
 619→                var bottomSheet =
 620→                    fm.findFragmentByTag(NOTIFICATIONS_BOTTOM_SHEET_TAG) as? CommentNotificationsBottomSheetFragment
 621→                if (showBottomSheetData.show && bottomSheet == null) {
 622→                    bottomSheet = CommentNotificationsBottomSheetFragment.newInstance(
 623→                        showBottomSheetData.isReceivingNotifications,
 624→                        true
 625→                    )
 626→                    bottomSheet.show(fm, NOTIFICATIONS_BOTTOM_SHEET_TAG)
 627→                } else if (!showBottomSheetData.show && bottomSheet != null) {
 628→                    bottomSheet.dismiss()
 629→                }
 630→            }
 631→
 632→            conversationViewModel.updateFollowUiState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { uiState ->
 633→                manageFollowConversationUiState(uiState, binding)
 634→            }
 635→
 636→            viewModel.commentSnippetState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { state ->
 637→                manageCommentSnippetUiState(state)
 638→            }
 639→        }
 640→
 641→        viewModel.showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
 642→            JetpackPoweredBottomSheetFragment
 643→                .newInstance()
 644→                .show(childFragmentManager, JetpackPoweredBottomSheetFragment.TAG)
 645→        }
 646→
 647→        viewModel.reloadFragment.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
 648→            if (isAdded) {
 649→                //  Based on my research some people did that in a single transaction and it worked in the past,
 650→                //  but I tested on SDK 34 and I had to do it in two transactions for getting it to work properly.
 651→                parentFragmentManager.commit(allowStateLoss = true) {
 652→                    detach(this@ReaderPostDetailFragment)
 653→                }
 654→                parentFragmentManager.commit {
 655→                    attach(this@ReaderPostDetailFragment)
 656→                }
 657→            }
 658→        }
 659→    }

 661→    private fun manageFollowConversationUiState(
 662→        uiState: FollowConversationUiState,
 663→        binding: ReaderFragmentPostDetailBinding
 664→    ) {
 665→        if (!isAdded) return
 666→
 667→        with(binding) {
 668→            val bellItem = commentsSnippet.bellIcon
 669→            val followContainer = commentsSnippet.followConversationContainer
 670→
 671→            val shimmerView: ShimmerFrameLayout = commentsSnippet.shimmerViewContainer
 672→            val followText = commentsSnippet.followConversation
 673→            followText.setOnClickListener(
 674→                if (uiState.onFollowTapped != null) {
 675→                    View.OnClickListener { uiState.onFollowTapped.invoke() }
 676→                } else {
 677→                    null
 678→                }
 679→            )
 680→            bellItem.setOnClickListener {
 681→                uiState.onManageNotificationsTapped.invoke()
 682→            }
 683→            followContainer.isEnabled = uiState.flags.isMenuEnabled
 684→            followText.isEnabled = uiState.flags.isMenuEnabled
 685→            bellItem.isEnabled = uiState.flags.isMenuEnabled
 686→            if (uiState.flags.showMenuShimmer) {
 687→                if (!shimmerView.isShimmerVisible) {
 688→                    shimmerView.showShimmer(true)
 689→                } else if (!shimmerView.isShimmerStarted) {
 690→                    shimmerView.startShimmer()
 691→                }
 692→            } else {
 693→                shimmerView.hideShimmer()
 694→            }
 695→            shimmerView.visibility = if (uiState.flags.isFollowMenuVisible) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 696→            bellItem.visibility = if (uiState.flags.isBellMenuVisible) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 697→        }
 698→    }

 700→    private fun manageLikesUiState(state: TrainOfFacesUiState) {
 701→        if (!isAdded) return
 702→
 703→        with(requireActivity()) {
 704→            if (this.isFinishing) return@with
 705→
 706→            val shouldSkipAnimation = likeFacesTrain.visibility == View.GONE && state.goingToShowFaces
 707→
 708→            setupLikeFacesTrain(
 709→                state.engageItemsList,
 710→                state.showLoading,
 711→                shouldSkipAnimation
 712→            )
 713→
 714→            likeProgressBar.visibility = if (state.showLoading) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 715→            likeFacesTrain.visibility = if (state.showLikeFacesTrainContainer) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 716→
 717→            if (state.showEmptyState) {
 718→                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(likeEmptyStateText, state.emptyStateTitle?.let {
 719→                    getString(R.string.like_faces_error_loading_message, uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(this, it))
 720→                })
 721→                likeEmptyStateText.visibility = View.VISIBLE
 722→            } else {
 723→                likeEmptyStateText.visibility = View.GONE
 724→            }
 725→
 726→            likeFacesTrain.contentDescription = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(
 727→                contextProvider.getContext(),
 728→                state.contentDescription
 729→            )
 730→
 731→            likeFacesTrain.setOnClickListener {
 732→                if (!isAdded) return@setOnClickListener
 733→
 734→                viewModel.onLikesClicked()
 735→            }
 736→        }
 737→    }

 766→    private fun setupLikeFacesTrain(items: List<TrainOfAvatarsItem>, loading: Boolean, shouldSkipAnimation: Boolean) {
 767→        likeFacesRecycler.visibility = if (loading) View.GONE else View.VISIBLE
 768→
 769→        if (shouldSkipAnimation) {
 770→            likeFacesRecycler.itemAnimator = null
 771→        } else if (likeFacesRecycler.itemAnimator == null) {
 772→            likeFacesRecycler.itemAnimator = DefaultItemAnimator()
 773→        }
 774→
 775→        var adapter = likeFacesRecycler.adapter as? TrainOfAvatarsAdapter
 776→
 777→        if (adapter == null) {
 778→            adapter = TrainOfAvatarsAdapter(
 779→                imageManager,
 780→                uiHelpers
 781→            )
 782→
 783→            likeFacesRecycler.adapter = adapter
 784→        }
 785→
 786→        val recyclerViewState = likeFacesRecycler.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
 787→        adapter.loadData(items)
 788→        likeFacesRecycler.layoutManager?.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
 789→    }

 791→    private fun renderUiState(state: ReaderPostDetailsUiState, binding: ReaderFragmentPostDetailBinding) {
 792→        onPostExecuteShowPost()
 793→
 794→        if (jetpackBrandingUtils.shouldShowJetpackBranding()) {
 795→            val screen = JetpackPoweredScreen.WithDynamicText.READER_POST_DETAIL
 796→            binding.jetpackBadge.root.isVisible = true
 797→            binding.jetpackBadge.jetpackPoweredBadge.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(
 798→                requireContext(),
 799→                jetpackBrandingUtils.getBrandingTextForScreen(screen)
 800→            )
 801→            if (jetpackBrandingUtils.shouldShowJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()) {
 802→                binding.jetpackBadge.jetpackPoweredBadge.setOnClickListener {
 803→                    jetpackBrandingUtils.trackBadgeTapped(screen)
 804→                    viewModel.showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()
 805→                }
 806→            }
 807→        }
 808→
 809→        binding.headerView.updatePost(state.headerUiState, getReadingPreferences())
 810→        showOrHideMoreMenu(state)
 811→
 812→        updateFeaturedImage(state.featuredImageUiState, binding)
 813→        updateExcerptFooter(state.excerptFooterUiState)
 814→
 815→        with(layoutFooterBinding) {
 816→            updateActionButton(state.postId, state.blogId, state.actions.likeAction, like)
 817→            updateActionButton(state.postId, state.blogId, state.actions.reblogAction, reblog)
 818→            updateActionButton(state.postId, state.blogId, state.actions.commentsAction, comment)
 819→            updateActionButton(state.postId, state.blogId, state.actions.bookmarkAction, bookmark)
 820→        }
 821→
 822→        state.localRelatedPosts?.let { showRelatedPosts(it) }
 823→        state.globalRelatedPosts?.let { showRelatedPosts(it) }
 824→    }

 840→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongMethod")
 841→    private fun ReaderNavigationEvents.handleNavigationEvent() {
 842→        when (this) {
 843→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowMediaPreview -> MediaPreviewActivity
 844→                .showPreview(requireContext(), site, featuredImage)
 845→
 846→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowPostsByTag -> ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderTagPreview(
 847→                context,
 848→                this.tag,
 849→                ReaderTracker.SOURCE_POST_DETAIL,
 850→                readerTracker
 851→            )
 852→
 853→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowBlogPreview -> ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderBlogOrFeedPreview(
 854→                context,
 855→                this.siteId,
 856→                this.feedId,
 857→                this.isFollowed,
 858→                ReaderTracker.SOURCE_POST_DETAIL,
 859→                readerTracker
 860→            )
 861→
 862→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.SharePost -> ReaderActivityLauncher.sharePost(context, post)
 863→
 864→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.OpenPost -> ReaderActivityLauncher.openPost(context, post)
 865→
 866→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReportPost ->
 867→                ReaderActivityLauncher.openUrl(context, readerUtilsWrapper.getReportPostUrl(url), OpenUrlType.INTERNAL)
 868→
 869→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReportUser -> ReaderActivityLauncher.openUrl(
 870→                context,
 871→                readerUtilsWrapper.getReportUserUrl(url, authorId),
 872→                OpenUrlType.INTERNAL
 873→            )
 874→
 875→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReaderComments -> ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderCommentsForResult(
 876→                this@ReaderPostDetailFragment,
 877→                blogId,
 878→                postId,
 879→                this.source.sourceDescription
 880→            )
 881→
 882→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowNoSitesToReblog -> ReaderActivityLauncher.showNoSiteToReblog(activity)
 883→
 884→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowSitePickerForResult ->
 885→                ActivityLauncher
 886→                    .showSitePickerForResult(this@ReaderPostDetailFragment, this.preselectedSite, this.mode)
 887→
 888→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.OpenEditorForReblog ->
 889→                ActivityLauncher.openEditorForReblog(activity, this.site, this.post, this.source)
 890→
 891→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowBookmarkedTab -> ActivityLauncher.viewSavedPostsListInReader(activity)
 892→
 893→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowBookmarkedSavedOnlyLocallyDialog -> showBookmarkSavedLocallyDialog(this)
 894→
 895→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.OpenUrl -> ReaderActivityLauncher.openUrl(requireContext(), url)
 896→
 897→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowRelatedPostDetails ->
 898→                showRelatedPostDetail(postId = this.postId, blogId = this.blogId)
 899→
 900→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ReplaceRelatedPostDetailsWithHistory ->
 901→                replaceRelatedPostDetailWithHistory(postId = this.postId, blogId = this.blogId)
 902→
 903→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowPostInWebView -> showPostInWebView(post)
 904→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowEngagedPeopleList -> {
 905→                ActivityLauncher.viewPostLikesListActivity(
 906→                    activity,
 907→                    this.siteId,
 908→                    this.postId,
 909→                    this.headerData,
 910→                    EngagementNavigationSource.LIKE_READER_LIST
 911→                )
 912→            }
 913→
 914→            ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReadingPreferences ->
 915→                ReaderReadingPreferencesDialogFragment.show(
 916→                    childFragmentManager,
 917→                    ReaderReadingPreferencesTracker.Source.POST_DETAIL_MORE_MENU,
 918→                )
 919→
 920→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowPostDetail,
 921→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowVideoViewer,
 922→            is ReaderNavigationEvents.ShowReaderSubs -> Unit // Do Nothing
 923→        }
 924→    }

1000→    private fun createMoreMenuPopup(actions: List<ReaderPostCardAction>, v: View) {
1001→        readerTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_ARTICLE_DETAIL_MORE_TAPPED)
1002→        moreMenuPopup = ListPopupWindow(v.context)
1003→        moreMenuPopup?.let {
1004→            it.width = v.context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_width)
1005→            it.setAdapter(ReaderMenuAdapter(v.context, uiHelpers, actions))
1006→            it.setDropDownGravity(Gravity.END)
1007→            it.anchorView = v
1008→            it.isModal = true
1009→            it.setOnItemClickListener { _, _, position, _ ->
1010→                viewModel.onMoreMenuItemClicked(actions[position].type)
1011→            }
1012→            it.setOnDismissListener {
1013→                viewModel.onMoreMenuDismissed()
1014→                moreMenuPopup = null
1015→            }
1016→        }
1017→    }

1047→    private fun prepareMenu(menu: Menu) {
1048→        val postHasUrl = viewModel.post?.hasUrl() == true
1049→        val menuBrowse = menu.findItem(R.id.menu_browse)
1050→        // browse require the post to have a URL (some feed-based posts don't have one) or an intercepted URI
1051→        menuBrowse?.isVisible = postHasUrl || viewModel.interceptedUri != null
1052→        // share require the post to have a URL
1053→        val menuShare = menu.findItem(R.id.menu_share)
1054→        menuShare?.isVisible = postHasUrl
1055→        // reading preferences require the feature flag to be on
1056→        val menuReadingPreferences = menu.findItem(R.id.menu_reading_preferences)
1057→        menuReadingPreferences?.isVisible = readingPreferencesFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
1058→    }

1063→            if (viewModel.hasPost) {

1071→            true

1073→        R.id.menu_share -> {

1077→                    it.blogId,
1078→                    it.feedId,
1079→                    it.isFollowedByCurrentUser,

1084→            true
1085→        }
1086→        R.id.menu_more -> {
1087→            viewModel.onMoreButtonClicked()
1088→            true
1089→        }
1090→        R.id.menu_reading_preferences -> {
1091→            ReaderReadingPreferencesDialogFragment.show(
1092→                childFragmentManager,
1093→                ReaderReadingPreferencesTracker.Source.POST_DETAIL_TOOLBAR,
1094→            )
1095→            true
1096→        }

1201→     */

1203→        viewModel.isFeed = false
1204→        this.blogId = blogId
1205→        this.postId = postId
1206→
1207→        if (clearCommentOperation) {
1208→            directOperation = null
1209→            commentId = 0
1210→        }
1211→
1212→        hasAlreadyUpdatedPost = false
1213→        hasTrackedGlobalRelatedPosts = false
1214→        hasTrackedLocalRelatedPosts = false
1215→
1216→        // hide views that would show info for the previous post - these will be re-displayed
1217→        // with the correct info once the new post loads
1218→        globalRelatedPostsView.visibility = View.GONE
1219→        localRelatedPostsView.visibility = View.GONE
1220→        if (likesEnhancementsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {

1223→        if (commentsSnippetFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {

1226→
1227→        // clear the webView - otherwise it will remain scrolled to where the user scrolled to
1228→        readerWebView.clearContent()
1229→
1230→        // now show the passed post
1231→        showPost()

1243→        // fade in this related posts view

1251→    /*
1252→     * track that related posts have loaded and are scrolled into view if we haven't
1253→     * already tracked it
1254→     */
1255→    private fun trackRelatedPostsIfShowing() {
1256→        if (!hasTrackedGlobalRelatedPosts && isVisibleAndScrolledIntoView(globalRelatedPostsView)) {
1257→            hasTrackedGlobalRelatedPosts = true
1258→            AppLog.d(T.READER, "reader post detail > global related posts rendered")
1259→            globalRelatedPostsView.trackRailcarRender()

1261→
1262→        if (!hasTrackedLocalRelatedPosts && isVisibleAndScrolledIntoView(localRelatedPostsView)) {

1269→    /*
1270→     * returns True if the passed view is visible and has been scrolled into view - assumes
1271→     * that the view is a child of mScrollView
1272→     */
1273→    private fun isVisibleAndScrolledIntoView(view: View?): Boolean {
1274→        if (view != null && view.visibility == View.VISIBLE) {
1275→            val scrollBounds = Rect()
1276→            scrollView.getHitRect(scrollBounds)
1277→            return view.getLocalVisibleRect(scrollBounds)
1278→        }
1279→        return false
1280→    }

1313→    /*
1314→     * get the latest version of this post
1315→     */
1316→    private fun updatePost() {
1317→        if (!viewModel.hasPost || viewModel.post?.isWP == false) {
1318→            setRefreshing(false)
1319→            return
1320→        }
1321→
1322→        val resultListener = ReaderActions.UpdateResultListener { result ->
1323→            val post = viewModel.post
1324→            if (isAdded && post != null) {
1325→                if (commentsSnippetFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
1326→                    conversationViewModel.onUpdatePost(post.blogId, post.postId)
1327→                    viewModel.onRefreshCommentsData(post.blogId, post.postId)
1328→                }
1329→
1330→                // if the post has changed, reload it from the db and update the like/comment counts
1331→                if (result.isNewOrChanged) {
1332→                    viewModel.post = ReaderPostTable.getBlogPost(post.blogId, post.postId, false)
1333→                    viewModel.post?.let {
1334→                        if (likesEnhancementsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
1335→                            viewModel.onRefreshLikersData(it)
1336→                        }
1337→                        viewModel.onUpdatePost(it)
1338→                    }
1339→                }
1340→
1341→                setRefreshing(false)
1342→
1343→                if (directOperation != null && directOperation == DirectOperation.POST_LIKE) {
1344→                    doLikePost()
1345→                }
1346→            }
1347→        }
1348→        viewModel.post?.let { ReaderPostActions.updatePost(it, resultListener) }
1349→    }

1351→    @Suppress("ReturnCount")
1352→    private fun doLikePost() {
1353→        if (!isAdded) {
1354→            return
1355→        }
1356→
1357→        if (!accountStore.hasAccessToken()) {
1358→            WPSnackbar.make(
1359→                requireView(), R.string.reader_snackbar_err_cannot_like_post_logged_out,
1360→                Snackbar.LENGTH_INDEFINITE
1361→            ).setAction(R.string.sign_in, mSignInClickListener).show()
1362→            return
1363→        }
1364→
1365→        viewModel.post?.let {
1366→            if (!it.canLikePost()) {
1367→                ToastUtils.showToast(activity, R.string.reader_toast_err_cannot_like_post)
1368→                return
1369→            }
1370→
1371→            if (!it.isLikedByCurrentUser) {
1372→                viewModel.onButtonClicked(it.postId, it.blogId, ReaderPostCardActionType.LIKE)
1373→            }
1374→        }
1375→    }

1442→     */

1444→    fun onEventMainThread(event: ReaderEvents.PostSlugsRequestCompleted) {
1445→        postSlugsResolutionUnderway = false

1447→        if (!isAdded) {

1449→        }
1450→
1451→        val progress = requireView().findViewById<ProgressBar>(R.id.progress_loading)

1453→
1454→        if (event.statusCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_OK) {

1461→    private fun onRequestFailure(statusCode: Int) {
1462→        if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(activity)) {
1463→            showError(getString(R.string.no_network_message))
1464→        } else {
1465→            when (statusCode) {
1466→                HttpURLConnection.HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED, HttpURLConnection.HTTP_FORBIDDEN ->

1468→
1469→                HttpURLConnection.HTTP_NOT_FOUND -> showError(getString(R.string.reader_err_get_post_not_found))
1470→                else -> showError(getString(R.string.reader_err_get_post_generic))
1471→            }
1472→        }

1475→    /*

1477→     */

1479→        if (!isAdded) {

1484→        txtError.text = errorMessage

1486→        context?.let {

1489→            } catch (e: Resources.NotFoundException) {
1490→                AppLog.e(T.READER, "Drawable not found. See issue #11576", e)
1491→                null

1493→            icon?.let {

1495→            }

1497→
1498→        if (errorMessage == null) {

1556→    // overridePendingTransition is deprecated in SDK 34 in favor of overrideActivityTransition, but the latter requires
1557→    // SDK 34. overridePendingTransition still works on Android 14 so using it should be safe for now.
1558→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
1559→    private fun handleDirectOperation() = when (directOperation) {
1560→        DirectOperation.COMMENT_JUMP, DirectOperation.COMMENT_REPLY, DirectOperation.COMMENT_LIKE -> {
1561→            viewModel.post?.let {
1562→                context?.let { nonNullContext ->
1563→                    ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderComments(
1564→                        nonNullContext, it.blogId, it.postId,
1565→                        directOperation, commentId.toLong(), viewModel.interceptedUri,
1566→                        DIRECT_OPERATION.sourceDescription
1567→                    )
1568→                }
1569→            }
1570→
1571→            activity?.finish()
1572→            activity?.overridePendingTransition(0, 0)
1573→            true
1574→        }
1575→        // Like needs to be handled "later" after the post has been updated from the server, nothing special to do here.
1576→        DirectOperation.POST_LIKE -> false
1577→        null -> false
1578→    }

1580→    private fun showPostInWebView(post: ReaderPost) {
1581→        readerWebView.setIsPrivatePost(post.isPrivate)
1582→        readerWebView.setBlogSchemeIsHttps(UrlUtils.isHttps(post.blogUrl))
1583→        readerProgressBar.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1584→        renderer = ReaderPostRenderer(
1585→            readerWebView,
1586→            viewModel.post,
1587→            readerCssProvider,
1588→            getReadingPreferences()
1589→        ).also {
1590→            it.setPostMessageListener(object : ReaderPostMessageListener {
1591→                override fun onArticleTextCopied() {
1592→                    viewModel.onArticleTextCopied()
1593→                }
1594→
1595→                override fun onArticleTextHighlighted() {
1596→                    viewModel.onArticleTextHighlighted()
1597→                }
1598→            })
1599→        }
1600→
1601→        // if the post is from private atomic site postpone render until we have a special access cookie
1602→        if (post.isPrivateAtomic && privateAtomicCookie.isCookieRefreshRequired()) {
1603→            PrivateAtCookieRefreshProgressDialog.showIfNecessary(childFragmentManager)
1604→            requestPrivateAtomicCookie()
1605→        } else if (post.isPrivateAtomic && privateAtomicCookie.exists()) {
1606→            // make sure we add cookie to the cookie manager if it exists before starting render
1607→            CookieManager.getInstance().setCookie(
1608→                privateAtomicCookie.getDomain(), privateAtomicCookie.getCookieContent()
1609→            )
1610→            renderer?.beginRender()
1611→        } else {
1612→            renderer?.beginRender()
1613→        }
1614→    }
1615→
1616→    private fun requestPrivateAtomicCookie() {
1617→        dispatcher.dispatch(
1618→            viewModel.post?.let {
1619→                SiteActionBuilder.newFetchPrivateAtomicCookieAction(FetchPrivateAtomicCookiePayload(it.blogId))
1620→            }
1621→        )
1622→    }

1624→    /*
1625→     * called by the web view when the content finishes loading - related posts aren't displayed
1626→     * until this is triggered, to avoid having them appear before the webView content
1627→     */
1628→    override fun onPageFinished(view: WebView, url: String?) {
1629→        if (!isAdded) {
1630→            return
1631→        }
1632→
1633→        readerProgressBar.visibility = View.GONE
1634→
1635→        if (url != null && url == "about:blank") {
1636→            // brief delay before showing related posts to give page time to render
1637→            view.postDelayed(Runnable {
1638→                if (!isAdded) {
1639→                    return@Runnable
1640→                }
1641→                if (!hasAlreadyUpdatedPost) {
1642→                    hasAlreadyUpdatedPost = true
1643→                    updatePost()
1644→                }
1645→                viewModel.post?.let {
1646→                    if (likesEnhancementsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
1647→                        viewModel.onRefreshLikersData(it)
1648→                    }
1649→                    if (commentsSnippetFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
1650→                        viewModel.onRefreshCommentsData(it.blogId, it.postId)
1651→                    }
1652→                    viewModel.onRelatedPostsRequested(it)
1653→                }
1654→            }, ON_PAGE_FINISHED_DELAY_MILLIS)
1655→        } else {
1656→            url?.let { AppLog.w(T.READER, "reader post detail > page finished - $it") }
1657→        }
1658→    }

1660→    /*
1661→     * return the container view that should host the full screen video
1662→     */
1663→    override fun onRequestCustomView(): ViewGroup? {

1666→        } else {

1700→    override fun onUrlClick(url: String): Boolean {
1701→        readerTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_ARTICLE_LINK_TAPPED)
1702→
1703→        when {
1704→            ReaderUtils.isBlogPreviewUrl(url) -> onBlogPreviewUrlClick(url)
1705→            ReaderUtils.isTagUrl(url) -> viewModel.onTagItemClicked(ReaderUtils.getTagFromTagUrl(url))
1706→            isFile(url) -> onFileDownloadClick(url)
1707→            else -> {
1708→                val openUrlType = if (shouldOpenExternal(url)) OpenUrlType.EXTERNAL else OpenUrlType.INTERNAL
1709→                ReaderActivityLauncher.openUrl(activity, url, openUrlType)
1710→            }
1711→        }
1712→
1713→        return true
1714→    }
1715→
1716→    // if this is a "wordpress://blogpreview?" link, show blog preview for the blog - this is
1717→    // used for Discover posts that highlight a blog
1718→    private fun onBlogPreviewUrlClick(url: String) {
1719→        val siteId = ReaderUtils.getBlogIdFromBlogPreviewUrl(url)
1720→        if (siteId != 0L) {
1721→            ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderBlogPreview(
1722→                activity,
1723→                siteId,
1724→                viewModel.post?.isFollowedByCurrentUser,
1725→                ReaderTracker.SOURCE_POST_DETAIL,
1726→                readerTracker
1727→            )
1728→        }
1729→    }
1730→
1731→    override fun onPageJumpClick(pageJump: String?): Boolean {
1732→        readerTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_ARTICLE_PAGE_JUMP_TAPPED)
1733→        val wasJsEnabled = readerWebView.settings.javaScriptEnabled
1734→
1735→        readerWebView.settings.javaScriptEnabled = true
1736→
1737→        readerWebView.evaluateJavascript("document.getElementById('$pageJump').offsetTop") { result ->
1738→            // Note that 'result' can be the string 'null' in case the page jump identifier is not found on page
1739→            val offsetTop = StringUtils.stringToInt(result, -1)
1740→            if (offsetTop >= 0) {
1741→                val yOffset = (resources.displayMetrics.density * offsetTop).toInt()
1742→                scrollView.smoothScrollTo(0, yOffset)
1743→            } else {
1744→                ToastUtils.showToast(activity, R.string.reader_toast_err_page_jump_not_found)
1745→            }
1746→        }
1747→
1748→        readerWebView.settings.javaScriptEnabled = wasJsEnabled
1749→        return true
1750→    }
1751→
1752→    /*
1753→     * returns True if the passed URL should be opened in the external browser app
1754→     */
1755→    @Suppress("ReturnCount")
1756→    private fun shouldOpenExternal(url: String): Boolean {
1757→        // open YouTube videos in external app so they launch the YouTube player
1758→        if (ReaderVideoUtils.isYouTubeVideoLink(url)) {
1759→            return true
1760→        }
1761→
1762→        // Open Stories links in external browser so they have more fullscreen play real estate
1763→        if (Uri.parse(url).queryParameterNames.any { it.contains("wp-story") }) {
1764→            return true
1765→        }
1766→
1767→        // if the mime type starts with "application" open it externally - this will either
1768→        // open it in the associated app or the default browser (which will enable the user
1769→        // to download it)
1770→        return isFile(url)
1771→
1772→        // open all other urls using an AuthenticatedWebViewActivity
1773→    }
1774→
1775→    private fun isFile(url: String): Boolean {
1776→        val mimeType = UrlUtils.getUrlMimeType(url)
1777→        return mimeType != null && mimeType.startsWith("application")
1778→    }

1781→        readerTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_ARTICLE_IMAGE_TAPPED)
1782→        return showPhotoViewer(imageUrl, view, x, y)
1783→    }

1785→    override fun onFileDownloadClick(fileUrl: String?): Boolean {
1786→        readerTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_ARTICLE_FILE_DOWNLOAD_TAPPED)
1787→        return if (activity != null &&
1788→            fileUrl != null &&
1789→            PermissionUtils.checkAndRequestFileDownloadPermission(
1790→                this,
1791→                READER_FILE_DOWNLOAD_PERMISSION_REQUEST_CODE
1792→            )
1793→        ) {
1794→            readerFileDownloadManager.downloadFile(fileUrl)
1795→            true
1796→        } else {
1797→            fileForDownload = fileUrl
1798→            false
1799→        }
1800→    }

1803→    override fun onRequestPermissionsResult(
1804→        requestCode: Int,
1805→        permissions: Array<String>,
1806→        grantResults: IntArray
1807→    ) {
1808→        val activity = activity
1809→        if (activity != null &&
1810→            requestCode == READER_FILE_DOWNLOAD_PERMISSION_REQUEST_CODE &&
1811→            grantResults.isNotEmpty() &&
1812→            grantResults[0] == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
1813→        ) {
1814→            fileForDownload?.let { readerFileDownloadManager.downloadFile(it) }
1815→        }
1816→        fileForDownload = null
1817→    }

1819→    fun pauseWebView() {
1820→        if (view == null) {
1821→            AppLog.w(T.READER, "reader post detail > attempt to pause null webView")
1822→        } else if (!isWebViewPaused) {
1823→            AppLog.d(T.READER, "reader post detail > pausing webView")
1824→            readerWebView.hideCustomView()
1825→            readerWebView.onPause()
1826→            isWebViewPaused = true
1827→        }
1828→    }

1830→    fun resumeWebViewIfPaused() {
1831→        if (view == null) {

1833→        } else if (isWebViewPaused) {
1834→            AppLog.d(T.READER, "reader post detail > resuming paused webView")
1835→            readerWebView.onResume()
1836→            isWebViewPaused = false
1837→        }
1838→    }

1887→        fun newInstance(blogId: Long, postId: Long): ReaderPostDetailFragment {

1890→
1891→        @Suppress("LongParameterList")
1892→        fun newInstance(
1893→            isFeed: Boolean,
1894→            blogId: Long,
1895→            postId: Long,
1896→            directOperation: DirectOperation?,
1897→            commentId: Int,
1898→            isRelatedPost: Boolean,
1899→            interceptedUri: String?,
1900→            postListType: ReaderPostListType?,
1901→            postSlugsResolutionUnderway: Boolean
1902→        ): ReaderPostDetailFragment {
1903→            AppLog.d(T.READER, "reader post detail > newInstance")
1904→
1905→            val args = Bundle()
1906→            args.putBoolean(ReaderConstants.ARG_IS_FEED, isFeed)
1907→            args.putLong(ReaderConstants.ARG_BLOG_ID, blogId)
1908→            args.putLong(ReaderConstants.ARG_POST_ID, postId)
1909→            args.putBoolean(ReaderConstants.ARG_IS_RELATED_POST, isRelatedPost)
1910→            args.putSerializable(ReaderConstants.ARG_DIRECT_OPERATION, directOperation)
1911→            args.putInt(ReaderConstants.ARG_COMMENT_ID, commentId)
1912→            args.putString(ReaderConstants.ARG_INTERCEPTED_URI, interceptedUri)
1913→            if (postListType != null) {
1914→                args.putSerializable(ReaderConstants.ARG_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
1915→            }
1916→            args.putBoolean(
1917→                ReaderConstants.KEY_POST_SLUGS_RESOLUTION_UNDERWAY,
1918→                postSlugsResolutionUnderway
1919→            )
1920→
1921→            val fragment = ReaderPostDetailFragment()
1922→            fragment.arguments = args
1923→
1924→            return fragment
1925→        }
1926→    }
1927→}

118→

121→

201→    fun copyPost(site: SiteModel, postToCopy: PostModel, performChecks: Boolean = false) {
202→        if (performChecks && (postConflictDetector.hasUnhandledConflict(postToCopy) ||
203→                    postConflictDetector.hasUnhandledAutoSave(postToCopy))
204→        ) {
205→            postListDialogHelper.showCopyConflictDialog(postToCopy)
206→            return
207→        }
208→        val post = postStore.instantiatePostModel(
209→            site,
210→            false,
211→            postToCopy.title,
212→            postToCopy.content,
213→            PostStatus.DRAFT.toString(),
214→            postToCopy.categoryIdList,
215→            postToCopy.postFormat,
216→            true
217→        )
218→        _postListAction.postValue(PostListAction.EditPost(site, post, loadAutoSaveRevision = false))
219→    }
220→
221→    /**
222→     * Filtering by author is disable on:
223→     * 1) Self-hosted sites - The XMLRPC api doesn't support filtering by author.
224→     * 2) Jetpack sites - we need to pass in the self-hosted user id to be able to filter for authors
225→     * which we currently can't
226→     * 3) Sites on which the user doesn't have permissions to edit posts of other users.
227→     *
228→     * This behavior is consistent with Calypso as of 11/4/2019.
229→     */
230→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {
231→        site.isUsingWpComRestApi && site.hasCapabilityEditOthersPosts
232→                && (site.isSingleUserSite != null && !site.isSingleUserSite)
233→    }
234→
235→    init {
236→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.CREATED
237→    }
238→
239→    @Suppress("LongMethod")
240→    fun start(
241→        site: SiteModel,
242→        initPreviewState: PostListRemotePreviewState,
243→        currentBottomSheetPostId: LocalId,
244→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
245→    ) {
246→        if (isStarted) return
247→        this.site = site
248→        this.editPostRepository = editPostRepository
249→
250→        val authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection = if (isFilteringByAuthorSupported) {
251→            prefs.postListAuthorSelection
252→        } else {
253→            AuthorFilterSelection.EVERYONE
254→        }
255→
256→        postListEventListenerFactory.createAndStartListening(
257→            lifecycle = lifecycleOwner.lifecycle,
258→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
259→            bgDispatcher = bgDispatcher,
260→            postStore = postStore,
261→            site = site,
262→            postActionHandler = postActionHandler,
263→            handlePostUpdatedWithoutError = postConflictResolver::onPostSuccessfullyUpdated,
264→            handlePostUploadedWithoutError = {
265→                refreshAllLists()
266→            },
267→            triggerPostUploadAction = { _postUploadAction.postValue(it) },
268→            invalidateUploadStatus = {
269→                uploadStatusTracker.invalidateUploadStatus(it)
270→                invalidateAllLists()
271→            },
272→            invalidateFeaturedMedia = {
273→                featuredImageTracker.invalidateFeaturedMedia(it)
274→                invalidateAllLists()
275→            },
276→            triggerPreviewStateUpdate = this::updatePreviewAndDialogState,
277→            isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList = this::isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList,
278→            hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError = this::hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError
279→        )
280→
281→        _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
282→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
283→            isFabVisible = FAB_VISIBLE_POST_LIST_PAGES.contains(POST_LIST_PAGES.first()) &&
284→                    isSearchExpanded.value != true,
285→            isAuthorFilterVisible = isFilteringByAuthorSupported,
286→            authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection,
287→            authorFilterItems = getAuthorFilterItems(authorFilterSelection, accountStore.account?.avatarUrl)
288→        )
289→        _previewState.value = _previewState.value ?: initPreviewState
290→
291→        currentBottomSheetPostId.let { postId ->
292→            if (postId.value != 0) {
293→                editPostRepository.loadPostByLocalPostId(postId.value)
294→            }
295→        }
296→
297→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED
298→
299→        uploadStarter.queueUploadFromSite(site)
300→
301→        editPostRepository.run {
302→            postChanged.observe(lifecycleOwner, Observer {
303→                savePostToDbUseCase.savePostToDb(editPostRepository, site)
304→            })
305→        }
306→
307→        isStarted = true

509→    /**
510→     * Only the non-null variables will be changed in the current state
511→     */
512→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
513→    private fun updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
514→        isFabVisible: Boolean? = null,
515→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean? = null,
516→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection? = null,
517→        authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>? = null
518→    ) {
519→        val currentState = requireNotNull(viewState.value) {
520→            "updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange should not be called before the initial state is set"
521→        }
522→
523→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
524→            isFabVisible ?: currentState.isFabVisible,
525→            isAuthorFilterVisible ?: currentState.isAuthorFilterVisible,
526→            authorFilterSelection ?: currentState.authorFilterSelection,
527→            authorFilterItems ?: currentState.authorFilterItems
528→        )
529→
530→        if (authorFilterSelection != null && currentState.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
531→            _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
532→
533→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
534→                POST_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,
535→                site,
536→                mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_AUTHOR_FILTER to authorFilterSelection.toString() as Any)
537→            )
538→        }
539→    }

569→    private fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
570→        // We need only transitions, so...
571→        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
572→
573→        AppLog.d(
574→            AppLog.T.POSTS,
575→            "Posts list preview state machine: transition from ${_previewState.value} to $newState"
576→        )
577→
578→        // update the state
579→        val prevState = _previewState.value
580→        _previewState.postValue(newState)
581→
582→        // take care of exit actions on state transition
583→        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
584→            newState,
585→            prevState,
586→            postInfo,
587→            postActionHandler::handleRemotePreview
588→        )
589→    }

 16→sealed class PostListEmptyUiState(
 17→    val title: UiString? = null,
 18→    @DrawableRes val imgResId: Int? = null,
 19→    val buttonText: UiString? = null,
 20→    val onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
 21→    val emptyViewVisible: Boolean = true
 22→) {
 23→    class EmptyList(
 24→        title: UiString,
 25→        buttonText: UiString? = null,
 26→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
 27→        @DrawableRes imageResId: Int = R.drawable.img_illustration_posts_75dp
 28→    ) : PostListEmptyUiState(
 29→        title = title,
 30→        imgResId = imageResId,
 31→        buttonText = buttonText,
 32→        onButtonClick = onButtonClick
 33→    )
 34→
 35→    object DataShown : PostListEmptyUiState(emptyViewVisible = false)
 36→
 37→    object Loading : PostListEmptyUiState(
 38→        title = UiStringRes(R.string.posts_fetching),
 39→        imgResId = R.drawable.img_illustration_posts_75dp
 40→    )
 41→
 42→    class RefreshError(
 43→        title: UiString,
 44→        buttonText: UiString? = null,
 45→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)? = null
 46→    ) : PostListEmptyUiState(
 47→        title = title,
 48→        imgResId = R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp,
 49→        buttonText = buttonText,
 50→        onButtonClick = onButtonClick
 51→    )

 53→    object PermissionsError : PostListEmptyUiState(

 58→
 59→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 60→fun createEmptyUiState(
 61→    postListType: PostListType,
 62→    isNetworkAvailable: Boolean,
 63→    isLoadingData: Boolean,
 64→    isListEmpty: Boolean,
 65→    isSearchPromptRequired: Boolean,
 66→    error: ListError?,
 67→    fetchFirstPage: () -> Unit,
 68→    newPost: () -> Unit
 69→): PostListEmptyUiState {
 70→    return if (isListEmpty) {
 71→        when {
 72→            error != null -> createErrorListUiState(
 73→                isNetworkAvailable = isNetworkAvailable,
 74→                error = error,
 75→                fetchFirstPage = fetchFirstPage
 76→            )
 77→            isLoadingData -> {
 78→                // don't show intermediate screen when loading search results
 79→                if (postListType == SEARCH) {
 80→                    PostListEmptyUiState.DataShown
 81→                } else {
 82→                    PostListEmptyUiState.Loading
 83→                }
 84→            }
 85→            else -> createEmptyListUiState(
 86→                postListType = postListType,
 87→                newPost = newPost,
 88→                isSearchPromptRequired = isSearchPromptRequired
 89→            )
 90→        }
 91→    } else {
 92→        PostListEmptyUiState.DataShown
 93→    }
 94→}
 95→
 96→private fun createErrorListUiState(
 97→    isNetworkAvailable: Boolean,
 98→    error: ListError,
 99→    fetchFirstPage: () -> Unit
100→): PostListEmptyUiState {
101→    return if (error.type == PERMISSION_ERROR) {
102→        PostListEmptyUiState.PermissionsError
103→    } else {
104→        val errorText = if (isNetworkAvailable) {
105→            UiStringRes(R.string.error_refresh_posts)
106→        } else {
107→            UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message)
108→        }
109→        PostListEmptyUiState.RefreshError(
110→            errorText,
111→            UiStringRes(R.string.retry),
112→            fetchFirstPage
113→        )
114→    }
115→}

118→    postListType: PostListType,
119→    newPost: () -> Unit,

121→): PostListEmptyUiState.EmptyList {

130→            UiStringRes(R.string.posts_empty_list_button),

132→        )
133→        SCHEDULED -> PostListEmptyUiState.EmptyList(
134→            UiStringRes(R.string.posts_scheduled_empty),
135→            UiStringRes(R.string.posts_empty_list_button),
136→            newPost

138→        SEARCH -> {

141→            } else {

146→        }

 317→    private fun loadPagesAsync() = launch(defaultDispatcher) {

 321→        reloadPages(loadState)

 323→        isInitialized = true
 324→
 325→        scrollToPageId?.let {
 326→            onSpecificPageRequested(it)
 327→        }
 328→    }

 330→    private suspend fun reloadPages(state: PageListState = REFRESHING, forced: Boolean = false) {
 331→        if (performIfNetworkAvailableAsync {
 332→                _listState.setOnUi(state)
 333→
 334→                val result = pageStore.requestPagesFromServer(site, forced)
 335→                if (result.isError) {
 336→                    _listState.setOnUi(ERROR)
 337→                    showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_refresh_pages)))
 338→                    AppLog.e(PAGES, "An error occurred while fetching the Pages")
 339→                } else {
 340→                    _listState.setOnUi(DONE)
 341→                }
 342→                refreshPages()
 343→            }) else {
 344→            _listState.setOnUi(DONE)
 345→        }
 346→    }

 383→    private fun trackTabChangeEvent(type: PageListType) {
 384→        val tab = when (type) {

 388→            TRASHED -> "binned"
 389→        }

 391→        AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(PAGES_TAB_PRESSED, site, properties)

 398→    fun onSearch(searchQuery: String, delay: Long = SEARCH_DELAY) {
 399→        searchJob?.cancel()
 400→        if (searchQuery.isNotEmpty()) {
 401→            searchJob = launch {
 402→                delay(delay)
 403→                searchJob = null
 404→                if (isActive) {
 405→                    _lastSearchQuery = searchQuery
 406→                    val result = groupedSearch(site, searchQuery)
 407→                    _searchPages.postValue(result)
 408→                }
 409→            }
 410→        } else {
 411→            clearSearch()
 412→        }
 413→    }

 421→            } else {

 423→            }

 429→    fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
 430→        // We need only transitions, so...
 431→        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
 432→
 433→        // update the state
 434→        val prevState = _previewState.value
 435→        _previewState.postValue(newState)
 436→
 437→        // take care of exit actions on state transition
 438→        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
 439→            newState,
 440→            prevState,
 441→            postInfo,
 442→            this::handleRemotePreview
 443→        )
 444→    }

 446→    private suspend fun groupedSearch(
 447→        site: SiteModel,
 448→        searchQuery: String
 449→    ): SortedMap<PageListType, List<PageModel>> = withContext(defaultDispatcher) {
 450→        val list = pageStore.search(site, searchQuery)
 451→            .groupBy { PageListType.fromPageStatus(it.status) }
 452→
 453→        return@withContext list.toSortedMap { previous, next ->
 454→            when {
 455→                previous == next -> 0
 456→                previous == PUBLISHED -> -1
 457→                next == PUBLISHED -> 1
 458→                previous == DRAFTS -> -1
 459→                next == DRAFTS -> 1
 460→                previous == SCHEDULED -> -1
 461→                next == SCHEDULED -> 1
 462→                else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Unexpected page type")
 463→            }
 464→        }
 465→    }
 466→
 467→    fun onSearchExpanded(restorePreviousSearch: Boolean) {
 468→        if (isSearchExpanded.value != true) {
 469→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(PAGES_SEARCH_ACCESSED, site)
 470→
 471→            if (!restorePreviousSearch) {
 472→                clearSearch()
 473→            }
 474→
 475→            _isSearchExpanded.value = true
 476→            _isNewPageButtonVisible.value = false
 477→        }
 478→    }
 479→
 480→    fun onSearchCollapsed() {
 481→        _isSearchExpanded.value = false
 482→        clearSearch()
 483→
 484→        launch {

 486→            checkIfNewPageButtonShouldBeVisible()
 487→        }
 488→    }

 490→    fun onMenuAction(action: PagesListAction, page: Page, context: Context? = null): Boolean {
 491→        when (action) {
 492→            VIEW_PAGE -> previewPage(page)
 493→            SET_PARENT -> setParent(page)
 494→            MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> changePageStatus(page.remoteId, PageStatus.DRAFT)
 495→            MOVE_TO_TRASH -> changePageStatus(page.remoteId, PageStatus.TRASHED)
 496→            PUBLISH_NOW -> publishPageNow(page.remoteId)
 497→            DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> deletePage(page)
 498→            CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD -> cancelPendingAutoUpload(LocalId(page.localId))
 499→            SET_AS_HOMEPAGE -> setHomepage(page.remoteId)
 500→            SET_AS_POSTS_PAGE -> setPostsPage(page.remoteId)
 501→            COPY -> onCopyPage(page)
 502→            SHARE -> context?.let { copyPageLink(page, it) }
 503→            PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> navigateToBlazeOverlay(page.remoteId)
 504→        }
 505→        return true

 786→    private fun setParent(page: PageModel, parentId: Long) {
 787→        val oldParent = page.parent?.remoteId ?: 0
 788→
 789→        val action = PageAction(page.remoteId, UPLOAD) {
 790→            if (page.parent?.remoteId != parentId) {
 791→                val updatedPage = updateParent(page, parentId)
 792→
 793→                pageStore.uploadPageToServer(updatedPage)
 794→            }
 795→        }
 796→
 797→        action.undo = {
 798→            launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 799→                pageMap[action.remoteId]?.let { changed ->
 800→                    val updatedPage = updateParent(changed, oldParent)
 801→
 802→                    pageStore.uploadPageToServer(updatedPage)
 803→                }
 804→            }
 805→        }
 806→
 807→        action.onSuccess = {
 808→            launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 809→                reloadPages()
 810→
 811→                showSnackbar(
 812→                    if (action.undo != null) {
 813→                        SnackbarMessageHolder(
 814→                            UiStringRes(R.string.page_parent_changed),
 815→                            UiStringRes(R.string.undo),
 816→                            action.undo!!
 817→                        )
 818→                    } else {
 819→                        SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.page_parent_changed))
 820→                    }
 821→                )
 822→            }
 823→        }
 824→        action.onError = {
 825→            launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 826→                refreshPages()
 827→
 828→                showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.page_parent_change_error)))
 829→            }
 830→        }
 831→
 832→        launch {
 833→            _arePageActionsEnabled = false
 834→            actionPerformer.performAction(action)
 835→            _arePageActionsEnabled = true
 836→        }
 837→    }

 886→    private fun changePageStatus(remoteId: Long, status: PageStatus) {
 887→        performIfNetworkAvailable {
 888→            if (status == PageStatus.DRAFT) {
 889→                trackMenuSelectionEvent(MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
 890→            } else if (status == PageStatus.TRASHED) {
 891→                trackMenuSelectionEvent(MOVE_TO_TRASH)
 892→            }
 893→
 894→            pageMap[remoteId]?.let { page ->
 895→                val oldStatus = page.status
 896→
 897→                val action = if (status != PageStatus.TRASHED || remoteId > 0) {
 898→                    // this is executed when a page is moved to
 899→                    PageAction(remoteId, UPLOAD) {
 900→                        val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page, status)
 901→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 902→                        _scrollToPage.postOnUi(updatedPage)
 903→                        pageStore.uploadPageToServer(updatedPage)
 904→                    }
 905→                } else {
 906→                    // Local pages are trashed locally
 907→                    PageAction(remoteId, UPDATE) {
 908→                        val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page, status)
 909→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 910→                        // should we scroll to the trash page - probably
 911→                        _scrollToPage.postOnUi(updatedPage)
 912→                    }
 913→                }
 914→
 915→                action.undo = {
 916→                    val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page.copy(remoteId = action.remoteId), oldStatus)
 917→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 918→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 919→                        updatePageMap(updatedPage)
 920→                        pageStore.uploadPageToServer(updatedPage)
 921→                    }
 922→                }
 923→
 924→                action.onSuccess = {
 925→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 926→                        delay(ACTION_DELAY)
 927→
 928→                        val message = prepareStatusChangeSnackbar(status, action.undo)
 929→                        showSnackbar(message)
 930→                    }
 931→                }
 932→                action.onError = {
 933→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 934→                        action.undo?.let { it() }
 935→
 936→                        showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.page_status_change_error)))
 937→                    }
 938→                }
 939→
 940→                launch {
 941→                    _arePageActionsEnabled = false
 942→                    actionPerformer.performAction(action)
 943→                    _arePageActionsEnabled = true
 944→                }
 945→            }
 946→        }
 947→    }
 948→
 949→    private fun updatePageStatus(page: PageModel, oldStatus: PageStatus): PageModel {
 950→        val updatedPage = page.copy(status = oldStatus)
 951→        val updatedMap = pageMap.toMutableMap()
 952→        updatedMap[page.remoteId] = updatedPage
 953→        pageMap = updatedMap
 954→        return updatedPage
 955→    }

 957→    private fun prepareStatusChangeSnackbar(newStatus: PageStatus, undo: (() -> Unit)? = null): SnackbarMessageHolder {
 958→        val message = when (newStatus) {
 959→            PageStatus.DRAFT -> R.string.page_moved_to_draft
 960→            PageStatus.PUBLISHED -> R.string.page_moved_to_published
 961→            PageStatus.TRASHED -> R.string.page_moved_to_trash
 962→            PageStatus.SCHEDULED -> R.string.page_moved_to_scheduled
 963→            else -> throw NotImplementedError("Status change to ${newStatus.getTitle()} not supported")
 964→        }
 965→
 966→        return if (undo != null) {
 967→            SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(message), UiStringRes(R.string.undo), undo)
 968→        } else {
 969→            SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(message))
 970→        }
 971→    }

1000→    fun updateAuthorFilterSelection(selectionId: Long) {

1002→

1012→    /**
1013→     * Filtering by author is disable on:
1014→     * 1) Self-hosted sites - The XMLRPC api doesn't support filtering by author.
1015→     * 2) Jetpack sites - we need to pass in the self-hosted user id to be able to filter for authors
1016→     * which we currently can't
1017→     * 3) Sites on which the user doesn't have permissions to edit posts of other users.
1018→     * 4) Single user sites - there is no point in filtering by author on single user sites.
1019→     *
1020→     * This behavior is consistent with Calypso and Posts as of 11/4/2019.
1021→     */
1022→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {
1023→        site.isUsingWpComRestApi && site.hasCapabilityEditOthersPages
1024→                && (site.isSingleUserSite != null && !site.isSingleUserSite)
1025→    }

1027→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
1028→    private fun updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
1029→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean? = null,
1030→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection? = null,
1031→        authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>? = null
1032→    ) {
1033→        val currentState = requireNotNull(authorUIState.value) {
1034→            "updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange should not be called before the initial state is set"
1035→        }
1036→
1037→        _authorUIState.value = _authorUIState.value?.copy(
1038→            isAuthorFilterVisible = isAuthorFilterVisible ?: currentState.isAuthorFilterVisible,
1039→            authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection ?: currentState.authorFilterSelection,
1040→            authorFilterItems = authorFilterItems ?: currentState.authorFilterItems
1041→        )
1042→
1043→        if (authorFilterSelection != null && currentState.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
1044→            _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
1045→
1046→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
1047→                PAGES_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,
1048→                site,
1049→                mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_AUTHOR_FILTER to authorFilterSelection.toString() as Any)
1050→            )
1051→        }
1052→    }

118→            val result = productsStore.fetchProducts(TYPE_DOMAINS_PRODUCT)
119→            when {
120→                result.isError -> {
121→                    AppLog.e(AppLog.T.DOMAIN_REGISTRATION, "Error while fetching domain products: ${result.error}")
122→                }
123→
124→                else -> {
125→                    products = result.products.orEmpty().associateBy { it.productId }
126→                }
127→            }
128→        }
129→    }
130→
131→    fun onCreateSiteBtnClicked() {
132→        selectedDomain?.let { domain ->
133→            tracker.trackDomainSelected(domain.domainName, currentQuery?.value.orEmpty(), domain.cost, domain.isFree)
134→            _createSiteBtnClicked.value = domain
135→        } // selectedDomain is null if the query has been asynchronously updated and the domain list has been changed.
136→    }
137→
138→    fun onClearTextBtnClicked() = _clearBtnClicked.call()
139→
140→    fun onHelpClicked() = _onHelpClicked.call()
141→
142→    fun onQueryChanged(query: String) = updateQuery(UserQuery(query))
143→
144→    private fun updateQuery(query: DomainSuggestionsQuery?) {
145→        currentQuery = query
146→        selectedDomain = null
147→        fetchDomainsJob?.cancel() // cancel any previous requests
148→        if (query != null && query.value.isNotBlank()) {
149→            fetchDomains(query)
150→        } else {
151→            resetUiState()
152→        }
153→    }
154→
155→    private fun resetUiState() = updateUiStateToContent(null, Ready(emptyList()))
156→
157→    private fun fetchDomains(query: DomainSuggestionsQuery) {
158→        if (networkUtils.isNetworkAvailable()) {
159→            updateUiStateToContent(query, Loading(Ready(emptyList()), false))
160→            fetchDomainsJob = launch {
161→                delay(THROTTLE_DELAY)
162→                val onSuggestedDomains: OnSuggestedDomains = fetchDomainsByPurchasingFeatureConfig(query.value)
163→
164→                withContext(mainDispatcher) {
165→                    onDomainsFetched(query, onSuggestedDomains)
166→                }
167→            }
168→        } else {
169→            tracker.trackErrorShown(ERROR_CONTEXT, SiteCreationErrorType.INTERNET_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR)
170→            updateUiStateToContent(
171→                query,
172→                Error(listState, errorMessageResId = R.string.no_network_message)
173→            )
174→        }
175→    }
176→
177→    private suspend fun fetchDomainsByPurchasingFeatureConfig(query: String): OnSuggestedDomains {
178→        val onlyWordpressCom = !plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
179→        val vendor = if (onlyWordpressCom) FETCH_DOMAINS_VENDOR_DOT else FETCH_DOMAINS_VENDOR_MOBILE
180→
181→        return fetchDomainsUseCase.fetchDomains(query, vendor, onlyWordpressCom)
182→    }
183→
184→    private fun onDomainsFetched(query: DomainSuggestionsQuery, event: OnSuggestedDomains) {
185→        // We want to treat `INVALID_QUERY` as if it's an empty result, so we'll ignore it
186→        if (event.isError && event.error.type != SuggestDomainErrorType.INVALID_QUERY) {
187→            tracker.trackErrorShown(
188→                ERROR_CONTEXT,
189→                event.error.type.toString(),
190→                event.error.message
191→            )
192→            updateUiStateToContent(
193→                query,
194→                Error(
195→                    listState,
196→                    errorMessageResId = R.string.site_creation_fetch_suggestions_error_unknown
197→                )
198→            )
199→        } else {
200→            /**
201→             * We would like to show the domains that matches the current query at the top. For this, we split the
202→             * domains into two, one part for the domain names that start with the current query plus `.` and the
203→             * other part for the others. We then combine them back again into a single list.
204→             */
205→            val domains = event.suggestions.map(::parseSuggestion)
206→                .partition { it.domainName.startsWith("${query.value}.") }
207→                .toList().flatten()
208→
209→            val isInvalidQuery = event.isError && event.error.type == SuggestDomainErrorType.INVALID_QUERY
210→            val emptyListMessage = UiStringRes(
211→                if (isInvalidQuery) R.string.new_site_creation_empty_domain_list_message_invalid_query
212→                else R.string.new_site_creation_empty_domain_list_message
213→            )
214→
215→            updateUiStateToContent(query, Success(domains), emptyListMessage)
216→        }
217→    }
218→
219→    private fun parseSuggestion(response: DomainSuggestionResponse): DomainModel = with(response) {
220→        DomainModel(
221→            domainName = domain_name,
222→            isFree = is_free,
223→            cost = cost.orEmpty(),
224→            productId = product_id,
225→            supportsPrivacy = supports_privacy,
226→        )
227→    }
228→
229→    private fun updateUiStateToContent(
230→        query: DomainSuggestionsQuery?,
231→        state: ListState<DomainModel>,
232→        emptyListMessage: UiString? = null
233→    ) {
234→        listState = state
235→        val isNonEmptyUserQuery = isNonEmptyUserQuery(query)
236→
237→        _uiState.value = DomainsUiState(
238→            headerUiState = createHeaderUiState(
239→                !isNonEmptyUserQuery
240→            ),
241→            searchInputUiState = createSearchInputUiState(
242→                showProgress = state is Loading,
243→                showClearButton = isNonEmptyUserQuery,
244→                showDivider = state.data.isNotEmpty()
245→            ),
246→            contentState = createDomainsUiContentState(query, state, emptyListMessage),
247→            createSiteButtonState = getCreateSiteButtonState()
248→        )
249→    }
250→
251→    private fun getCreateSiteButtonState() = selectedDomain?.run {
252→        when (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
253→            true -> if (isFree) CreateSiteButtonState.Free else CreateSiteButtonState.Paid
254→            else -> CreateSiteButtonState.Old
255→        }
256→    }
257→
258→    private fun createDomainsUiContentState(
259→        query: DomainSuggestionsQuery?,
260→        state: ListState<DomainModel>,
261→        emptyListMessage: UiString?
262→    ): DomainsUiContentState {
263→        // Only treat it as an error if the search is user initiated
264→        val isError = isNonEmptyUserQuery(query) && state is Error
265→
266→        val items = createSuggestionsUiStates(
267→            onRetry = { updateQuery(query) },
268→            query = query?.value,
269→            data = state.data,
270→            errorFetchingSuggestions = isError,
271→            errorResId = if (isError) (state as Error).errorMessageResId else null
272→        )
273→        return if (items.isEmpty()) {
274→            if (isNonEmptyUserQuery(query) && (state is Success || state is Ready)) {
275→                DomainsUiContentState.Empty(emptyListMessage)
276→            } else DomainsUiContentState.Initial(plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled())
277→        } else {
278→            DomainsUiContentState.VisibleItems(items)
279→        }
280→    }
281→
282→    private fun createSuggestionsUiStates(
283→        onRetry: () -> Unit,
284→        query: String?,
285→        data: List<DomainModel>,
286→        errorFetchingSuggestions: Boolean,
287→        @StringRes errorResId: Int?
288→    ): List<ListItemUiState> {
289→        val items: ArrayList<ListItemUiState> = ArrayList()
290→        if (errorFetchingSuggestions) {
291→            val errorUiState = Old.ErrorItemUiState(
292→                messageResId = errorResId ?: R.string.site_creation_fetch_suggestions_error_unknown,
293→                retryButtonResId = R.string.button_retry,
294→                onClick = onRetry,
295→            )
296→            items.add(errorUiState)
297→        } else {
298→            query?.let { value ->
299→                getDomainUnavailableUiState(value, data)?.let {
300→                    items.add(it)
301→                }
302→            }
303→
304→            val sortedDomains = sortDomains(data)
305→
306→            sortedDomains.forEachIndexed { index, domain ->
307→                val itemUiState = createAvailableItemUiState(domain, index)
308→                items.add(itemUiState)
309→            }
310→        }
311→        return items
312→    }
313→
314→    /**
315→     *  First two paid domains, become Recommended, and Best Alternative
316→     *  First Free domain listed after two paid domains
317→     *  Then remaining paid domains
318→     */
319→    private fun sortDomains(domains: List<DomainModel>): List<DomainModel> {
320→        return domains.partition { !it.isFree }.let { (paidDomains, freeDomains) ->
321→            paidDomains.take(2) + freeDomains + paidDomains.drop(2)
322→        }
323→    }
324→
325→    private fun createAvailableItemUiState(domain: DomainModel, index: Int): ListItemUiState {
326→        return when (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
327→            true -> {
328→                New.DomainUiState(
329→                    domain.domainName,
330→                    cost = when {
331→                        domain.isFree -> Cost.Free
332→                        else -> Cost.Paid(domain.cost)
333→                    },
334→                    isSelected = domain.domainName == selectedDomain?.domainName,
335→                    onClick = { onDomainSelected(domain) },
336→                    tags = listOfNotNull(
337→                        when (index) {
338→                            0 -> Tag.Recommended
339→                            1 -> Tag.BestAlternative
340→                            else -> null
341→                        },
342→                    ),
343→                )
344→            }
345→
346→            else -> {
347→                Old.DomainUiState.AvailableDomain(
348→                    domainSanitizer.getName(domain.domainName),
349→                    domainSanitizer.getDomain(domain.domainName),
350→                    checked = domain == selectedDomain,
351→                    onClick = { onDomainSelected(domain) }
352→                )
353→            }
354→        }
355→    }
356→
357→    @Suppress("ForbiddenComment", "ReturnCount")
358→    private fun getDomainUnavailableUiState(
359→        query: String,
360→        domains: List<DomainModel>
361→    ): ListItemUiState? {
362→        if (domains.isEmpty()) return null
363→        if (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) return null // TODO: Add FQDN availability check
364→        val sanitizedQuery = domainSanitizer.sanitizeDomainQuery(query)
365→        val isDomainUnavailable = domains.none { it.domainName.startsWith("$sanitizedQuery.") }
366→        return if (isDomainUnavailable) {
367→            Old.DomainUiState.UnavailableDomain(
368→                sanitizedQuery,
369→                ".wordpress.com",
370→                UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_unavailable_domain)
371→            )
372→        } else null
373→    }
374→
375→    private fun createHeaderUiState(isVisible: Boolean) = if (!isVisible) null else
376→        SiteCreationHeaderUiState(
377→            title = UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_domain_header_title),
378→            subtitle = UiStringRes(
379→                if (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) R.string.site_creation_domain_header_subtitle
380→                else R.string.new_site_creation_domain_header_subtitle,
381→            ),
382→        )
383→
384→private fun createSearchInputUiState(
385→        showProgress: Boolean,
386→        showClearButton: Boolean,
387→        showDivider: Boolean,
388→    ): SiteCreationSearchInputUiState {
389→        val hint = UiStringRes(
390→            if (plansInSiteCreationFeatureConfig.isEnabled())
391→                R.string.site_creation_domain_search_input_hint
392→            else
393→                R.string.new_site_creation_search_domain_input_hint
394→        )
395→        return SiteCreationSearchInputUiState(
396→            hint = hint,
397→            showProgress = showProgress,
398→            showClearButton = showClearButton,
399→            showDivider = showDivider,
400→            showKeyboard = true
401→        )
402→    }

404→    @VisibleForTesting(otherwise = VisibleForTesting.PRIVATE)
405→    fun onDomainSelected(domain: DomainModel) {
406→        selectedDomain = domain
407→    }

409→    private fun isNonEmptyUserQuery(query: DomainSuggestionsQuery?) = query is UserQuery && query.value.isNotBlank()
410→
411→    data class DomainsUiState(
412→        val headerUiState: SiteCreationHeaderUiState?,
413→        val searchInputUiState: SiteCreationSearchInputUiState,
414→        val contentState: DomainsUiContentState,
415→        val createSiteButtonState: CreateSiteButtonState?
416→    ) {
417→        sealed class DomainsUiContentState(
418→            val emptyViewVisibility: Boolean,
419→            val exampleViewVisibility: Boolean,
420→            val updatedExampleViewVisibility: Boolean,
421→            val items: List<ListItemUiState>
422→        ) {
423→            class Initial(isUpdatedExample: Boolean) : DomainsUiContentState(
424→                emptyViewVisibility = false,
425→                exampleViewVisibility = !isUpdatedExample,
426→                updatedExampleViewVisibility = isUpdatedExample,
427→                items = emptyList()
428→            )
429→
430→            class Empty(val message: UiString?) : DomainsUiContentState(
431→                emptyViewVisibility = true,
432→                exampleViewVisibility = false,
433→                updatedExampleViewVisibility = false,
434→                items = emptyList()
435→            )
436→
437→            class VisibleItems(items: List<ListItemUiState>) : DomainsUiContentState(
438→                emptyViewVisibility = false,
439→                exampleViewVisibility = false,
440→                updatedExampleViewVisibility = false,
441→                items = items
442→            )
443→        }
444→
445→        sealed class CreateSiteButtonState(@StringRes val stringRes: Int) {
446→            object Old : CreateSiteButtonState(R.string.site_creation_domain_finish_button)
447→            object Free : CreateSiteButtonState(R.string.site_creation_domain_button_continue_with_subdomain)
448→            object Paid : CreateSiteButtonState(R.string.site_creation_domain_button_purchase_domain)
449→        }
450→    }
451→
452→    sealed class ListItemUiState(open val type: Type) {
453→        enum class Type {
454→            DOMAIN_V1,
455→            DOMAIN_V2,
456→            ERROR_V1,
457→        }
458→
459→        sealed class Old(override val type: Type) : ListItemUiState(type) {
460→            sealed class DomainUiState(
461→                open val name: String,
462→                open val domain: String,
463→                open val checked: Boolean,
464→                val radioButtonVisibility: Boolean,
465→                open val subTitle: UiString? = null,
466→            ) : Old(Type.DOMAIN_V1) {
467→                data class AvailableDomain(
468→                    override val name: String,
469→                    override val domain: String,
470→                    override val checked: Boolean,
471→                    val onClick: () -> Unit,
472→                ) : DomainUiState(name, domain, checked, true)
473→
474→                data class UnavailableDomain(
475→                    override val name: String,
476→                    override val domain: String,
477→                    override val subTitle: UiString,
478→                ) : DomainUiState(name, domain, false, false, subTitle)
479→            }
480→
481→            data class ErrorItemUiState(
482→                @StringRes val messageResId: Int,
483→                @StringRes val retryButtonResId: Int,
484→                val onClick: () -> Unit,
485→            ) : Old(Type.ERROR_V1)
486→        }
487→
488→        sealed class New(override val type: Type) : ListItemUiState(type) {
489→            data class DomainUiState(
490→                val domainName: String,
491→                val cost: Cost,
492→                val isSelected: Boolean = false,
493→                val onClick: () -> Unit,
494→                val tags: List<Tag> = emptyList(),
495→            ) : New(Type.DOMAIN_V2) {
496→                sealed class Tag(
497→                    @ColorRes val dotColor: Int,
498→                    @ColorRes val subtitleColor: Int? = null,
499→                    val subtitle: UiString,
500→                ) {
501→                    constructor(@ColorRes color: Int, subtitle: UiString) : this(color, color, subtitle)
502→
503→                    object Unavailable : Tag(
504→                        R.color.red_50,
505→                        UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_tag_unavailable),
506→                    )
507→
508→                    object Recommended : Tag(
509→                        R.color.jetpack_green_50,
510→                        UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_tag_recommended),
511→                    )
512→
513→                    object BestAlternative : Tag(
514→                        R.color.purple_50,
515→                        UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_tag_best_alternative),
516→                    )
517→
518→                    object Sale : Tag(
519→                        R.color.yellow_50,
520→                        UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_tag_sale)
521→                    )
522→                }
523→
524→                sealed class Cost(val title: UiString) {
525→                    object Free : Cost(UiStringRes(R.string.free))
526→
527→                    data class Paid(private val titleCost: String) : Cost(
528→                        UiStringText(titleCost)
529→                    ) {
530→                        val strikeoutTitle = UiStringText(titleCost)
531→                        val subtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_free_with_annual_plan)
532→                    }
533→
534→                    data class OnSale(private val titleCost: String, private val strikeoutTitleCost: String) : Cost(
535→                        UiStringText(titleCost)
536→                    ) {
537→                        val strikeoutTitle = UiStringText(strikeoutTitleCost)
538→                        val subtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.site_creation_domain_cost_sale)
539→                    }
540→                }
541→            }
542→        }
543→    }
544→
545→    /**
546→     * An organized way to separate user initiated searches from automatic searches so we can handle them differently.
547→     */
548→    private sealed class DomainSuggestionsQuery(val value: String) {
549→        /**
550→         * User initiated search.
551→         */
552→        class UserQuery(value: String) : DomainSuggestionsQuery(value)
553→    }
554→}
